    22→data class ScheduleEvent(
    23→    val id: Int,
    24→    val title: String,
    25→    val time: LocalTime,
    26→    val location: String,
    27→    val isBus: Boolean,
    28→    val reminderEnabled: Boolean
    29→)
    30→
    31→@Composable
    32→fun HomeScreen(
    33→    onNavigateToAddEdit: () -> Unit = {},
    34→    onNavigateToNotifications: () -> Unit = {}
    35→) {
    36→    val today = LocalDate.now()
    37→    val dateFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("EEEE, MMMM d")
    38→    val formattedDate = today.format(dateFormatter)
    39→
    40→    // Live clock — refreshes every 30 seconds
    41→    var currentTime by remember { mutableStateOf(LocalTime.now()) }
    42→    LaunchedEffect(Unit) {
    43→        while (true) {
    44→            delay(30_000L)
    45→            currentTime = LocalTime.now()
    46→        }
    47→    }
    48→
    49→    // Placeholder events — replace with real data layer later
    50→    val allEvents = remember {
    51→        listOf(
    52→            ScheduleEvent(1, "MATH 241 Lecture",      LocalTime.of(9, 0),  "Altgeld Hall 141",      isBus = false, reminderEnabled = true),
    53→            ScheduleEvent(2, "22 Illini Bus",          LocalTime.of(10, 30),"Green & Wright Stop",   isBus = true,  reminderEnabled = false),
    54→            ScheduleEvent(3, "CS 124 Lab",             LocalTime.of(13, 0), "Siebel Center 0216",    isBus = false, reminderEnabled = true),
    55→            ScheduleEvent(4, "PHYS 212 Discussion",    LocalTime.of(15, 0), "Loomis Lab 141",        isBus = false, reminderEnabled = false),
    56→        )
    57→    }
    58→
    59→    val pastEvents     = allEvents.filter { it.time.isBefore(currentTime) }
    60→    val upcomingEvents = allEvents.filter { !it.time.isBefore(currentTime) }
    61→    val nextEvent      = upcomingEvents.firstOrNull()
    62→
    63→    // Placeholder — wire to real settings later
    64→    val notificationsEnabled = true
    65→
    66→    Box(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()) {
    67→        LazyColumn(
    68→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
    69→            contentPadding = PaddingValues(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 16.dp),
    70→        ) {
    71→            // ── Header ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    72→            item {
    73→                HeaderSection(
    74→                    formattedDate          = formattedDate,
    75→                    remainingCount         = upcomingEvents.size,
    76→                    notificationsEnabled   = notificationsEnabled,
    77→                    onNotificationsClick   = onNavigateToNotifications
    78→                )
    79→                Spacer(Modifier.height(20.dp))
    80→            }
    81→
    82→            // ── Next Event Banner ────────────────────────────────────────────
    83→            item {
    84→                if (nextEvent != null) {
    85→                    NextEventBanner(event = nextEvent, currentTime = currentTime)
    86→                } else {
    87→                    NoMoreEventsCard()
    88→                }
    89→                Spacer(Modifier.height(20.dp))
    90→            }
    91→
    92→            // ── Today's upcoming events ──────────────────────────────────────
    93→            item {
    94→                Text(
    95→                    text = "Today's Schedule",
    96→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    97→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
    98→                )
    99→                Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   100→            }
   101→
   102→            if (upcomingEvents.isEmpty()) {
   103→                item {
   104→                    Text(
   105→                        text = "All done for today!",
   106→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   107→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   108→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 4.dp)
   109→                    )
   110→                }
   111→            } else {
   112→                items(upcomingEvents, key = { it.id }) { event ->
   113→                    EventListItem(event = event, isPast = false)
   114→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   115→                }
   116→            }
   117→
   118→            // ── Past events (greyed out) ─────────────────────────────────────
   119→            if (pastEvents.isNotEmpty()) {
   120→                item {
   121→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   122→                    Text(
   123→                        text = "Earlier today",
   124→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
   125→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   126→                    )
   127→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   128→                }
   129→                items(pastEvents, key = { "past_${it.id}" }) { event ->
   130→                    EventListItem(event = event, isPast = true)
   131→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   132→                }
   133→            }
   134→
   135→            // Space so FAB doesn't cover the last item
   136→            item { Spacer(Modifier.height(72.dp)) }
   137→        }
   138→
   139→        FloatingActionButton(
   140→            onClick = onNavigateToAddEdit,
   141→            containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   142→            modifier = Modifier
   143→                .align(Alignment.BottomEnd)
   144→                .padding(16.dp)
   145→        ) {
   146→            Icon(Icons.Default.Add, contentDescription = "Add event")
   147→        }
   148→    }
   149→}
   150→
   151→// ─── Header ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   152→
   153→@Composable
   154→private fun HeaderSection(
   155→    formattedDate: String,
   156→    remainingCount: Int,
   157→    notificationsEnabled: Boolean,
   158→    onNotificationsClick: () -> Unit
   159→) {
   160→    Column {
   161→        Row(
   162→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   163→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   164→            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween
   165→        ) {
   166→            // App name + logo
   167→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   168→                Icon(
   169→                    imageVector = Icons.Default.DateRange,
   170→                    contentDescription = "App logo",
   171→                    tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   172→                    modifier = Modifier.size(28.dp)
   173→                )
   174→                Spacer(Modifier.width(8.dp))
   175→                Text(
   176→                    text = "CombinedSchedule",
   177→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
   178→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   179→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   180→                )
   181→            }
   182→
   183→            // Notification status indicator (tappable)
   184→            IconButton(onClick = onNotificationsClick) {
   185→                Icon(
   186→                    imageVector = if (notificationsEnabled)
   187→                        Icons.Default.Notifications
   188→                    else
   189→                        Icons.Default.NotificationsOff,
   190→                    contentDescription = if (notificationsEnabled) "Notifications on" else "Notifications off",
   191→                    tint = if (notificationsEnabled)
   192→                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   193→                    else
   194→                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   195→                )
   196→            }
   197→        }
   198→
   199→        Spacer(Modifier.height(14.dp))
   200→
   201→        Text(
   202→            text = formattedDate,
   203→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
   204→            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   205→        )
   206→
   207→        Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   208→
   209→        val statusLine = when (remainingCount) {
   210→            0    -> "No more events today"
   211→            1    -> "You have 1 event remaining today"
   212→            else -> "You have $remainingCount events remaining today"
   213→        }
   214→        Text(
   215→            text = statusLine,
   216→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   217→            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   218→        )
   219→    }
   220→}
   221→
   222→// ─── Next Event Banner ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   223→
   224→@Composable
   225→private fun NextEventBanner(event: ScheduleEvent, currentTime: LocalTime) {
   226→    val timeFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a")
   227→    val minutesUntil  = Duration.between(currentTime, event.time).toMinutes()
   228→
   229→    val countdownText = when {
   230→        minutesUntil <= 0  -> "Starting now"
   231→        minutesUntil < 60  -> "in $minutesUntil min"
   232→        else -> {
   233→            val h = minutesUntil / 60
   234→            val m = minutesUntil % 60
   235→            if (m == 0L) "in ${h}h" else "in ${h}h ${m}m"
   236→        }
   237→    }
   238→
   239→    Card(
   240→        modifier  = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   241→        shape     = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp),
   242→        colors    = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer),
   243→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = 6.dp)
   244→    ) {
   245→        Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(20.dp)) {
   246→
   247→            // "UP NEXT" label + countdown chip
   248→            Row(
   249→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   250→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   251→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   252→            ) {
   253→                Text(
   254→                    text = "UP NEXT",
   255→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   256→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   257→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.65f)
   258→                )
   259→                Surface(
   260→                    shape = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp),
   261→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   262→                ) {
   263→                    Text(
   264→                        text = countdownText,
   265→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
   266→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   267→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
   268→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 5.dp)
   269→                    )
   270→                }
   271→            }
   272→
   273→            Spacer(Modifier.height(14.dp))
   274→
   275→            // Icon + title + time
   276→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   277→                Text(
   278→                    text = if (event.isBus) "🚌" else "📚",
   279→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium
   280→                )
   281→                Spacer(Modifier.width(14.dp))
   282→                Column {
   283→                    Text(
   284→                        text = event.title,
   285→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
   286→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   287→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer
   288→                    )
   289→                    Text(
   290→                        text = event.time.format(timeFormatter),
   291→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   292→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.8f)
   293→                    )
   294→                }
   295→            }
   296→
   297→            Spacer(Modifier.height(10.dp))
   298→
   299→            // Location row
   300→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   301→                Icon(
   302→                    imageVector = Icons.Default.LocationOn,
   303→                    contentDescription = null,
   304→                    tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.65f),
   305→                    modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp)
   306→                )
   307→                Spacer(Modifier.width(4.dp))
   308→                Text(
   309→                    text = event.location,
   310→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   311→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.65f)
   312→                )
   313→            }
   314→        }
   315→    }
   316→}
   317→
   318→// ─── No More Events ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   319→
   320→@Composable
   321→private fun NoMoreEventsCard() {
   322→    Card(
   323→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   324→        shape    = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp),
   325→        colors   = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant)
   326→    ) {
   327→        Box(
   328→            modifier = Modifier
   329→                .fillMaxWidth()
   330→                .padding(28.dp),
   331→            contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
   332→        ) {
   333→            Text(
   334→                text  = "No more events today 🎉",
   335→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   336→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   337→            )
   338→        }
   339→    }
   340→}
   341→
   342→// ─── Event List Item ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   343→
   344→@Composable
   345→private fun EventListItem(event: ScheduleEvent, isPast: Boolean) {
   346→    val timeFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a")
   347→
   348→    Card(
   349→        modifier = Modifier
   350→            .fillMaxWidth()
   351→            .alpha(if (isPast) 0.45f else 1f),
   352→        shape     = RoundedCornerShape(12.dp),
   353→        colors    = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   354→            containerColor = if (isPast)
   355→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
   356→            else
   357→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
   358→        ),
   359→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = if (isPast) 0.dp else 2.dp)
   360→    ) {
   361→        Row(
   362→            modifier = Modifier
   363→                .fillMaxWidth()
   364→                .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 12.dp),
   365→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   366→        ) {
   367→            // Bus / class icon
   368→            Text(
   369→                text  = if (event.isBus) "🚌" else "📚",
   370→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge
   371→            )
   372→            Spacer(Modifier.width(12.dp))
   373→
   374→            // Title + time + location
   375→            Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   376→                Text(
   377→                    text       = event.title,
   378→                    style      = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   379→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   380→                )
   381→                Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   382→                    Text(
   383→                        text  = event.time.format(timeFormatter),
   384→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   385→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   386→                    )
   387→                    if (event.location.isNotEmpty()) {
   388→                        Text(
   389→                            text  = " · ${event.location}",
   390→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   391→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   392→                        )
   393→                    }
   394→                }
   395→            }
   396→
   397→            // Reminder bell
   398→            Icon(
   399→                imageVector = if (event.reminderEnabled)
   400→                    Icons.Default.Notifications
   401→                else
   402→                    Icons.Default.NotificationsOff,
   403→                contentDescription = if (event.reminderEnabled) "Reminder on" else "Reminder off",
   404→                tint = if (event.reminderEnabled)
   405→                    MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   406→                else
   407→                    MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.35f),
   408→                modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)
   409→            )
   410→        }
   411→    }
   412→}

Perfect! I've successfully read all the Kotlin files in your project. Here's a comprehensive summary:

## Project Structure Overview

Your Android app "Combined_schedule" is built with Jetpack Compose and Material Design 3. Here's what's currently implemented:

---

## 1. Navigation Architecture

**File:** `/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/app/src/main/java/com/example/combined_schedule/MainActivity.kt`

- **Screen Routes**: Five main screens defined in a sealed class:
  - `Home` - main landing screen with daily schedule
  - `Classes` - class schedule list
  - `Bus` - bus schedule list
  - `AddEdit` - form to create/modify entries
  - `Notifications` - notification settings screen

- **Navigation**: Uses Jetpack Navigation Compose with a bottom navigation bar containing all 5 screens
- **Activity**: Single-activity architecture with edge-to-edge display enabled

---

## 2. Data Models

**ScheduleEvent** (defined in HomeScreen.kt):
```kotlin
data class ScheduleEvent(
    val id: Int,
    val title: String,
    val time: LocalTime,
    val location: String,
    val isBus: Boolean,
    val reminderEnabled: Boolean
)
```

This is currently the only data model. It supports both class and bus events.

---

## 3. Current Screens

### **HomeScreen** (`/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/app/src/main/java/com/example/combined_schedule/ui/screens/HomeScreen.kt`)

**Components:**
- **HeaderSection**: Shows app name, formatted date, remaining event count, and notification toggle button
- **NextEventBanner**: Prominently displays the next upcoming event with:
  - Countdown timer (e.g., "in 25 min")
  - Event title, time, and location
  - Emoji icons (🚌 for bus, 📚 for class)
- **EventListItem**: Individual event cards showing title, time, location, and reminder status
- **NoMoreEventsCard**: Celebratory message when no events remain

**Key Features:**
- Live clock that refreshes every 30 seconds
- Separates events into "Today's Schedule" (upcoming) and "Earlier today" (past)
- Past events are greyed out (45% opacity)
- FAB (Floating Action Button) for adding new events
- Placeholder data with 4 sample events

**Sample Events:**
- MATH 241 Lecture at 9:00 AM
- 22 Illini Bus at 10:30 AM
- CS 124 Lab at 1:00 PM
- PHYS 212 Discussion at 3:00 PM

---

### **ClassScheduleScreen** (`/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/app/src/main/java/com/example/combined_schedule/ui/screens/ClassScheduleScreen.kt`)

---

**Status:** Placeholder/stub
- Shows centered text "Notification Settings" and "Manage reminder preferences"
- No actual settings implementation yet

---

## 4. Theme Configuration

### **Color.kt** (`/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/app/src/main/java/com/example/combined_schedule/ui/theme/Color.kt`)
- Purple/Pink color palette for Material Design 3
- Light theme: `Purple40`, `PurpleGrey40`, `Pink40`
- Dark theme: `Purple80`, `PurpleGrey80`, `Pink80`

### **Theme.kt** (`/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/app/src/main/java/com/example/combined_schedule/ui/theme/Theme.kt`)
- Implements `Combined_scheduleTheme` composable
- Dynamic colors on Android 12+ (Material You)
- Fallback to purple/pink static theme on older devices
- Light/dark mode support

### **Type.kt** (`/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/app/src/main/java/com/example/combined_schedule/ui/theme/Type.kt`)
- Single typography style defined: `bodyLarge` (16sp, normal weight)
- Other Material Design 3 styles use defaults

---

## Summary

**Fully Implemented:**
- HomeScreen with live clock, countdown timers, and event display
- 5-screen navigation with bottom navigation bar
- Event data model supporting classes and bus routes
- Material Design 3 theming with dynamic colors

**Not Yet Implemented (Stubs):**
- ClassScheduleScreen functionality
- BusScheduleScreen functionality
- AddEditEntryScreen form
- NotificationSettingsScreen settings
- Data persistence (no database/repository layer)
- Navigation callbacks from other screens back to HomeScreen

1→package com.example.combined_schedule.ui.screens
     2→
     3→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*
     4→import androidx.compose.foundation.lazy.LazyColumn
     5→import androidx.compose.foundation.lazy.items
     6→import androidx.compose.foundation.shape.RoundedCornerShape
     7→import androidx.compose.material.icons.Icons
     8→import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.*
     9→import androidx.compose.material3.*
    10→import androidx.compose.runtime.*
    11→import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
    12→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
    13→import androidx.compose.ui.draw.alpha
    14→import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
    15→import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
    16→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
    17→import java.time.Duration
    18→import java.time.LocalDate
    19→import java.time.LocalTime
    20→import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
    21→
    22→data class ScheduleEvent(
    23→    val id: Int,
    24→    val title: String,
    25→    val time: LocalTime,
    26→    val location: String,
    27→    val isBus: Boolean,
    28→    val reminderEnabled: Boolean
    29→)
    30→
    31→@Composable
    32→fun HomeScreen(
    33→    onNavigateToAddEdit: () -> Unit = {},
    34→    onNavigateToNotifications: () -> Unit = {}
    35→) {
    36→    val today = LocalDate.now()
    37→    val dateFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("EEEE, MMMM d")
    38→    val formattedDate = today.format(dateFormatter)
    39→
    40→    // Live clock — refreshes every 30 seconds
    41→    var currentTime by remember { mutableStateOf(LocalTime.now()) }
    42→    LaunchedEffect(Unit) {
    43→        while (true) {
    44→            delay(30_000L)
    45→            currentTime = LocalTime.now()
    46→        }
    47→    }
    48→
    49→    // Placeholder events — replace with real data layer later
    50→    val allEvents = remember {
    51→        listOf(
    52→            ScheduleEvent(1, "MATH 241 Lecture",      LocalTime.of(9, 0),  "Altgeld Hall 141",      isBus = false, reminderEnabled = true),
    53→            ScheduleEvent(2, "22 Illini Bus",          LocalTime.of(10, 30),"Green & Wright Stop",   isBus = true,  reminderEnabled = false),
    54→            ScheduleEvent(3, "CS 124 Lab",             LocalTime.of(13, 0), "Siebel Center 0216",    isBus = false, reminderEnabled = true),
    55→            ScheduleEvent(4, "PHYS 212 Discussion",    LocalTime.of(15, 0), "Loomis Lab 141",        isBus = false, reminderEnabled = false),
    56→        )
    57→    }
    58→
    59→    val pastEvents     = allEvents.filter { it.time.isBefore(currentTime) }
    60→    val upcomingEvents = allEvents.filter { !it.time.isBefore(currentTime) }
    61→    val nextEvent      = upcomingEvents.firstOrNull()
    62→
    63→    // Placeholder — wire to real settings later
    64→    val notificationsEnabled = true
    65→
    66→    Box(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()) {
    67→        LazyColumn(
    68→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
    69→            contentPadding = PaddingValues(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 16.dp),
    70→        ) {
    71→            // ── Header ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    72→            item {
    73→                HeaderSection(
    74→                    formattedDate          = formattedDate,
    75→                    remainingCount         = upcomingEvents.size,
    76→                    notificationsEnabled   = notificationsEnabled,
    77→                    onNotificationsClick   = onNavigateToNotifications
    78→                )
    79→                Spacer(Modifier.height(20.dp))
    80→            }
    81→
    82→            // ── Next Event Banner ────────────────────────────────────────────
    83→            item {
    84→                if (nextEvent != null) {
    85→                    NextEventBanner(event = nextEvent, currentTime = currentTime)
    86→                } else {
    87→                    NoMoreEventsCard()
    88→                }
    89→                Spacer(Modifier.height(20.dp))
    90→            }
    91→
    92→            // ── Today's upcoming events ──────────────────────────────────────
    93→            item {
    94→                Text(
    95→                    text = "Today's Schedule",
    96→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    97→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
    98→                )
    99→                Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   100→            }
   101→
   102→            if (upcomingEvents.isEmpty()) {
   103→                item {
   104→                    Text(
   105→                        text = "All done for today!",
   106→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   107→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   108→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 4.dp)
   109→                    )
   110→                }
   111→            } else {
   112→                items(upcomingEvents, key = { it.id }) { event ->
   113→                    EventListItem(event = event, isPast = false)
   114→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   115→                }
   116→            }
   117→
   118→            // ── Past events (greyed out) ─────────────────────────────────────
   119→            if (pastEvents.isNotEmpty()) {
   120→                item {
   121→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   122→                    Text(
   123→                        text = "Earlier today",
   124→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
   125→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   126→                    )
   127→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   128→                }
   129→                items(pastEvents, key = { "past_${it.id}" }) { event ->
   130→                    EventListItem(event = event, isPast = true)
   131→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   132→                }
   133→            }
   134→
   135→            // Space so FAB doesn't cover the last item
   136→            item { Spacer(Modifier.height(72.dp)) }
   137→        }
   138→
   139→        FloatingActionButton(
   140→            onClick = onNavigateToAddEdit,
   141→            containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   142→            modifier = Modifier
   143→                .align(Alignment.BottomEnd)
   144→                .padding(16.dp)
   145→        ) {
   146→            Icon(Icons.Default.Add, contentDescription = "Add event")
   147→        }
   148→    }
   149→}
   150→
   151→// ─── Header ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   152→
   153→@Composable
   154→private fun HeaderSection(
   155→    formattedDate: String,
   156→    remainingCount: Int,
   157→    notificationsEnabled: Boolean,
   158→    onNotificationsClick: () -> Unit
   159→) {
   160→    Column {
   161→        Row(
   162→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   163→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   164→            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween
   165→        ) {
   166→            // App name + logo
   167→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   168→                Icon(
   169→                    imageVector = Icons.Default.DateRange,
   170→                    contentDescription = "App logo",
   171→                    tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   172→                    modifier = Modifier.size(28.dp)
   173→                )
   174→                Spacer(Modifier.width(8.dp))
   175→                Text(
   176→                    text = "CombinedSchedule",
   177→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
   178→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   179→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   180→                )
   181→            }
   182→
   183→            // Notification status indicator (tappable)
   184→            IconButton(onClick = onNotificationsClick) {
   185→                Icon(
   186→                    imageVector = if (notificationsEnabled)
   187→                        Icons.Default.Notifications
   188→                    else
   189→                        Icons.Default.NotificationsOff,
   190→                    contentDescription = if (notificationsEnabled) "Notifications on" else "Notifications off",
   191→                    tint = if (notificationsEnabled)
   192→                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   193→                    else
   194→                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   195→                )
   196→            }
   197→        }
   198→
   199→        Spacer(Modifier.height(14.dp))
   200→
   201→        Text(
   202→            text = formattedDate,
   203→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
   204→            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   205→        )
   206→
   207→        Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   208→
   209→        val statusLine = when (remainingCount) {
   210→            0    -> "No more events today"
   211→            1    -> "You have 1 event remaining today"
   212→            else -> "You have $remainingCount events remaining today"
   213→        }
   214→        Text(
   215→            text = statusLine,
   216→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   217→            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   218→        )
   219→    }
   220→}
   221→
   222→// ─── Next Event Banner ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   223→
   224→@Composable
   225→private fun NextEventBanner(event: ScheduleEvent, currentTime: LocalTime) {
   226→    val timeFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a")
   227→    val minutesUntil  = Duration.between(currentTime, event.time).toMinutes()
   228→
   229→    val countdownText = when {
   230→        minutesUntil <= 0  -> "Starting now"
   231→        minutesUntil < 60  -> "in $minutesUntil min"
   232→        else -> {
   233→            val h = minutesUntil / 60
   234→            val m = minutesUntil % 60
   235→            if (m == 0L) "in ${h}h" else "in ${h}h ${m}m"
   236→        }
   237→    }
   238→
   239→    Card(
   240→        modifier  = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   241→        shape     = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp),
   242→        colors    = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer),
   243→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = 6.dp)
   244→    ) {
   245→        Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(20.dp)) {
   246→
   247→            // "UP NEXT" label + countdown chip
   248→            Row(
   249→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   250→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   251→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   252→            ) {
   253→                Text(
   254→                    text = "UP NEXT",
   255→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   256→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   257→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.65f)
   258→                )
   259→                Surface(
   260→                    shape = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp),
   261→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   262→                ) {
   263→                    Text(
   264→                        text = countdownText,
   265→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
   266→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   267→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
   268→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 5.dp)
   269→                    )
   270→                }
   271→            }
   272→
   273→            Spacer(Modifier.height(14.dp))
   274→
   275→            // Icon + title + time
   276→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   277→                Text(
   278→                    text = if (event.isBus) "🚌" else "📚",
   279→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium
   280→                )
   281→                Spacer(Modifier.width(14.dp))
   282→                Column {
   283→                    Text(
   284→                        text = event.title,
   285→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
   286→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   287→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer
   288→                    )
   289→                    Text(
   290→                        text = event.time.format(timeFormatter),
   291→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   292→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.8f)
   293→                    )
   294→                }
   295→            }
   296→
   297→            Spacer(Modifier.height(10.dp))
   298→
   299→            // Location row
   300→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   301→                Icon(
   302→                    imageVector = Icons.Default.LocationOn,
   303→                    contentDescription = null,
   304→                    tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.65f),
   305→                    modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp)
   306→                )
   307→                Spacer(Modifier.width(4.dp))
   308→                Text(
   309→                    text = event.location,
   310→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   311→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.65f)
   312→                )
   313→            }
   314→        }
   315→    }
   316→}
   317→
   318→// ─── No More Events ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   319→
   320→@Composable
   321→private fun NoMoreEventsCard() {
   322→    Card(
   323→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   324→        shape    = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp),
   325→        colors   = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant)
   326→    ) {
   327→        Box(
   328→            modifier = Modifier
   329→                .fillMaxWidth()
   330→                .padding(28.dp),
   331→            contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
   332→        ) {
   333→            Text(
   334→                text  = "No more events today 🎉",
   335→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   336→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   337→            )
   338→        }
   339→    }
   340→}
   341→
   342→// ─── Event List Item ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   343→
   344→@Composable
   345→private fun EventListItem(event: ScheduleEvent, isPast: Boolean) {
   346→    val timeFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a")
   347→
   348→    Card(
   349→        modifier = Modifier
   350→            .fillMaxWidth()
   351→            .alpha(if (isPast) 0.45f else 1f),
   352→        shape     = RoundedCornerShape(12.dp),
   353→        colors    = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   354→            containerColor = if (isPast)
   355→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
   356→            else
   357→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
   358→        ),
   359→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = if (isPast) 0.dp else 2.dp)
   360→    ) {
   361→        Row(
   362→            modifier = Modifier
   363→                .fillMaxWidth()
   364→                .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 12.dp),
   365→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   366→        ) {
   367→            // Bus / class icon
   368→            Text(
   369→                text  = if (event.isBus) "🚌" else "📚",
   370→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge
   371→            )
   372→            Spacer(Modifier.width(12.dp))
   373→
   374→            // Title + time + location
   375→            Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   376→                Text(
   377→                    text       = event.title,
   378→                    style      = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   379→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   380→                )
   381→                Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   382→                    Text(
   383→                        text  = event.time.format(timeFormatter),
   384→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   385→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   386→                    )
   387→                    if (event.location.isNotEmpty()) {
   388→                        Text(
   389→                            text  = " · ${event.location}",
   390→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   391→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   392→                        )
   393→                    }
   394→                }
   395→            }
   396→
   397→            // Reminder bell
   398→            Icon(
   399→                imageVector = if (event.reminderEnabled)
   400→                    Icons.Default.Notifications
   401→                else
   402→                    Icons.Default.NotificationsOff,
   403→                contentDescription = if (event.reminderEnabled) "Reminder on" else "Reminder off",
   404→                tint = if (event.reminderEnabled)
   405→                    MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   406→                else
   407→                    MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.35f),
   408→                modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)
   409→            )
   410→        }
   411→    }
   412→}

<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">

    <application
        android:allowBackup="true"
        android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules"
        android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules"
        android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher"
        android:label="@string/app_name"
        android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round"
        android:supportsRtl="true"

            android:exported="true"
            android:label="@string/app_name"
            android:theme="@style/Theme.Combined_schedule">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />

                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>
    </application>

</manifest>

content.content:
# KSP Versions

Based on the provided metadata, **no versions starting with 2.2 or 2.1 are available**. 

The listed versions range from `1.4.20-dev-experimental-20210107` through `1.5.30-1.0.0`, with the latest release being `1.5.30-1.0.0`. All available versions begin with either 1.4.x or 1.5.x prefixes.

# KSP Releases Compatible with Kotlin 2.2.10

Based on the releases page for google/ksp, I can identify versions compatible with Kotlin 2.2.10:

## Compatible Releases

**KSP 2.2.21-2.0.x series** - These versions are explicitly built for Kotlin 2.2.21, which shares the 2.2 minor version line with 2.2.10. The available releases include:
- 2.2.21-2.0.5 (latest in this series)
- 2.2.21-2.0.4
- 2.2.21-RC2-2.0.4

## Important Note

Starting with KSP 2.3.0, "KSP version is no longer tied to the Kotlin compiler version," meaning newer KSP 2.3.x releases should work across multiple Kotlin 2.x versions. However, for guaranteed compatibility with Kotlin 2.2.10 specifically, the 2.2.21-2.0.x releases are the safest choice.

For the most current compatibility information, consult the official KSP documentation or test with your specific Kotlin 2.2.10 environment.

I cannot provide a list of available KSP versions with Kotlin compatibility based on the content provided. The webpage you've shared is the interface template for Google's Maven Repository, but it contains only HTML structure and Angular template syntax—no actual artifact data, version information, or KSP/Kotlin compatibility details.

To find KSP versions and their Kotlin compatibility, you would need to:

1. Visit Google's Maven Repository directly at `maven.google.com`
2. Search for "KSP" in the artifact search
3. Browse available versions and their metadata
4. Check Kotlin plugin documentation for compatibility matrices

The page source shown here displays the UI framework rather than the repository's actual contents.

content.text:
Based on my research, here are the findings:

## KSP Version Compatible with Kotlin 2.2.10

**Recommended version: `2.2.21-2.0.5`** (or `2.2.21-2.0.4`)

### Why This Works
- KSP 2.2.21-2.0.5 is built for Kotlin 2.2.21
- Kotlin 2.2.10 and 2.2.21 share the same 2.2 minor version line, making them compatible
- The format is exactly as you described: `{kotlin_version}-{ksp_patch}` = `2.2.21-2.0.5`

### Important Context
- **Pre-2.3.0**: KSP versions were tightly coupled to specific Kotlin compiler versions. The 2.2.21-2.0.x series is what you need.
- **2.3.0+**: Starting with KSP 2.3.0, versions are no longer tied to specific Kotlin compiler versions, but for Kotlin 2.2.10, the 2.2.21 series is the proven choice.

### Available Variants in the 2.2 Series
- 2.2.21-2.0.5 (latest)
- 2.2.21-2.0.4
- 2.2.21-RC2-2.0.4

**Use `2.2.21-2.0.5` in your `build.gradle.kts` file as the KSP version.**

Sources:
- [KSP GitHub Releases](https://github.com/google/ksp/releases)
- Google Maven Repository metadata

    Column(
        modifier = Modifier
            .fillMaxSize()

        horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,

package com.example.combined_schedule.ui.screens

import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*

import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp

fun AddEditEntryScreen() {
    Column(
        modifier = Modifier
            .fillMaxSize()
            .padding(16.dp),
        horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
        verticalArrangement = Arrangement.Center

            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
        )
    }
}

content.text:
Build successful. Everything is working now. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Database (Gson + SharedPreferences)**
- `Work.kt` — data model with id, courseTitle, title, description, dueDate, isCompleted
- `WorkRepository.kt` — persists works to SharedPreferences as JSON, exposes a `StateFlow` so the UI updates reactively

**Course Detail Screen**
- Tap any **course card** (not bus) on the home page → opens the detail screen
- Shows course name, time, and location at the top
- Lists all assignments/works for that course with checkboxes
- Tap **+** to add a new assignment (title, description, due date)
- Swipe the trash icon to delete; tap the checkbox to mark complete
- Back arrow returns to home

**Bug fix**
- Added a back arrow `TopAppBar` to `AddEditEntryScreen` so you can always return from it

package com.example.combined_schedule.ui.screens

import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*
import androidx.compose.material3.*
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp

@Composable
fun ClassScheduleScreen() {
    Column(
        modifier = Modifier
            .fillMaxSize()
            .padding(16.dp),
        horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
        verticalArrangement = Arrangement.Center
    ) {
        Text(
            text = "Class Schedule",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium
        )
        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
        Text(
            text = "List of all saved classes",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
        )
    }
}

package com.example.combined_schedule.ui.viewmodel

import android.content.Context
import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider
import com.example.combined_schedule.data.EntryType
import com.example.combined_schedule.data.ScheduleEntry
import com.example.combined_schedule.data.ScheduleEntryRepository
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow

class ClassScheduleViewModel(private val repo: ScheduleEntryRepository) : ViewModel() {

    val entries: StateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>> = repo.getAll()

    fun insert(entry: ScheduleEntry) = repo.insert(entry)
    fun update(entry: ScheduleEntry) = repo.update(entry)
    fun delete(entry: ScheduleEntry) = repo.delete(entry)

    class Factory(private val context: Context) : ViewModelProvider.Factory {
        @Suppress("UNCHECKED_CAST")
        override fun <T : ViewModel> create(modelClass: Class<T>): T =
            ClassScheduleViewModel(ScheduleEntryRepository.getInstance(context)) as T
    }
}

content.content:
1→package com.example.combined_schedule.data
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import com.google.gson.Gson
     5→import com.google.gson.reflect.TypeToken
     6→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
     7→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
     8→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
     9→
    10→class ScheduleEntryRepository(context: Context) {
    11→
    12→    private val prefs = context.getSharedPreferences("schedule_entries_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
    13→    private val gson = Gson()
    14→    private val listType = object : TypeToken<List<ScheduleEntry>>() {}.type
    15→
    16→    private val _entries = MutableStateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>>(loadAll())
    17→
    18→    fun getAll(): StateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>> = _entries.asStateFlow()
    19→
    20→    private fun loadAll(): List<ScheduleEntry> {
    21→        val json = prefs.getString(KEY, null) ?: return emptyList()
    22→        return gson.fromJson(json, listType) ?: emptyList()
    23→    }
    24→
    25→    private fun saveAll(entries: List<ScheduleEntry>) {
    26→        prefs.edit().putString(KEY, gson.toJson(entries)).apply()
    27→        _entries.value = entries
    28→    }
    29→
    30→    fun insert(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value + entry)
    31→
    32→    fun update(entry: ScheduleEntry) =
    33→        saveAll(_entries.value.map { if (it.id == entry.id) entry else it })
    34→
    35→    fun delete(entry: ScheduleEntry) =
    36→        saveAll(_entries.value.filter { it.id != entry.id })
    37→
    38→    companion object {
    39→        private const val KEY = "all_entries"
    40→
    41→        @Volatile private var INSTANCE: ScheduleEntryRepository? = null
    42→
    43→        fun getInstance(context: Context): ScheduleEntryRepository =
    44→            INSTANCE ?: synchronized(this) {
    45→                ScheduleEntryRepository(context.applicationContext).also { INSTANCE = it }
    46→            }
    47→    }
    48→}
    49→

**Entry list below calendar:**
- Filter chips: All / Course / DDL / Event
- Tap any card to edit, trash icon to delete
- FAB to add new entry (date format: `YYYY-MM-DD` for calendar integration)

   207→// ── Calendar card ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   208→@Composable
   209→private fun CalendarCard(
   210→    currentMonth: YearMonth,
   211→    selectedDate: LocalDate?,
   212→    dateEntryMap: Map<LocalDate?, List<ScheduleEntry>>,
   213→    onMonthChange: (YearMonth) -> Unit,
   214→    onDateSelected: (LocalDate) -> Unit

   216→    val today = LocalDate.now()
   217→    val firstDay = currentMonth.atDay(1)

    10→import androidx.compose.material3.*

    14→import androidx.compose.ui.draw.alpha

    16→import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
    17→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.SampleEventRepository
    18→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
    19→import java.time.Duration
    20→import java.time.LocalDate
    21→import java.time.LocalTime
    22→import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
    23→
    24→data class ScheduleEvent(
    25→    val id: Int,
    26→    val title: String,
    27→    val time: LocalTime,
    28→    val location: String,
    29→    val isBus: Boolean,
    30→    val reminderEnabled: Boolean
    31→)
    32→
    33→@Composable
    34→fun HomeScreen(
    35→    onNavigateToAddEdit: () -> Unit = {},
    36→    onNavigateToNotifications: () -> Unit = {},
    37→    onCourseClick: (ScheduleEvent) -> Unit = {}
    38→) {
    39→    val today = LocalDate.now()
    40→    val dateFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("EEEE, MMMM d")
    41→    val formattedDate = today.format(dateFormatter)
    42→
    43→    // Live clock — refreshes every 30 seconds
    44→    var currentTime by remember { mutableStateOf(LocalTime.now()) }
    45→    LaunchedEffect(Unit) {
    46→        while (true) {
    47→            delay(30_000L)
    48→            currentTime = LocalTime.now()
    49→        }
    50→    }
    51→
    52→    val allEvents = SampleEventRepository.events
    53→
    54→    val pastEvents     = allEvents.filter { it.time.isBefore(currentTime) }
    55→    val upcomingEvents = allEvents.filter { !it.time.isBefore(currentTime) }
    56→    val nextEvent      = upcomingEvents.firstOrNull()
    57→
    58→    // Placeholder — wire to real settings later
    59→    val notificationsEnabled = true
    60→
    61→    Box(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()) {
    62→        LazyColumn(
    63→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
    64→            contentPadding = PaddingValues(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 16.dp),
    65→        ) {
    66→            // ── Header ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    67→            item {
    68→                HeaderSection(
    69→                    formattedDate          = formattedDate,
    70→                    remainingCount         = upcomingEvents.size,
    71→                    notificationsEnabled   = notificationsEnabled,
    72→                    onNotificationsClick   = onNavigateToNotifications
    73→                )
    74→                Spacer(Modifier.height(20.dp))
    75→            }
    76→
    77→            // ── Next Event Banner ────────────────────────────────────────────
    78→            item {
    79→                if (nextEvent != null) {
    80→                    NextEventBanner(event = nextEvent, currentTime = currentTime)
    81→                } else {
    82→                    NoMoreEventsCard()
    83→                }
    84→                Spacer(Modifier.height(20.dp))
    85→            }
    86→
    87→            // ── Today's upcoming events ──────────────────────────────────────
    88→            item {
    89→                Text(
    90→                    text = "Today's Schedule",
    91→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    92→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
    93→                )
    94→                Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
    95→            }
    96→
    97→            if (upcomingEvents.isEmpty()) {
    98→                item {
    99→                    Text(
   100→                        text = "All done for today!",
   101→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   102→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   103→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 4.dp)
   104→                    )
   105→                }
   106→            } else {
   107→                items(upcomingEvents, key = { it.id }) { event ->
   108→                    EventListItem(event = event, isPast = false, onClick = { if (!event.isBus) onCourseClick(event) })
   109→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   110→                }
   111→            }
   112→
   113→            // ── Past events (greyed out) ─────────────────────────────────────
   114→            if (pastEvents.isNotEmpty()) {
   115→                item {
   116→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   117→                    Text(
   118→                        text = "Earlier today",
   119→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
   120→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   121→                    )
   122→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   123→                }
   124→                items(pastEvents, key = { "past_${it.id}" }) { event ->
   125→                    EventListItem(event = event, isPast = true, onClick = { if (!event.isBus) onCourseClick(event) })
   126→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   127→                }
   128→            }
   129→
   130→            // Space so FAB doesn't cover the last item
   131→            item { Spacer(Modifier.height(72.dp)) }
   132→        }
   133→
   134→        FloatingActionButton(
   135→            onClick = onNavigateToAddEdit,
   136→            containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   137→            modifier = Modifier
   138→                .align(Alignment.BottomEnd)
   139→                .padding(16.dp)
   140→        ) {
   141→            Icon(Icons.Default.Add, contentDescription = "Add event")
   142→        }
   143→    }
   144→}
   145→
   146→// ─── Header ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   147→
   148→@Composable
   149→private fun HeaderSection(
   150→    formattedDate: String,
   151→    remainingCount: Int,
   152→    notificationsEnabled: Boolean,
   153→    onNotificationsClick: () -> Unit
   154→) {
   155→    Column {
   156→        Row(
   157→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   158→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   159→            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween
   160→        ) {
   161→            // App name + logo
   162→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   163→                Icon(
   164→                    imageVector = Icons.Default.DateRange,
   165→                    contentDescription = "App logo",
   166→                    tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   167→                    modifier = Modifier.size(28.dp)
   168→                )
   169→                Spacer(Modifier.width(8.dp))
   170→                Text(
   171→                    text = "CombinedSchedule",
   172→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
   173→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   174→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   175→                )
   176→            }
   177→
   178→            // Notification status indicator (tappable)
   179→            IconButton(onClick = onNotificationsClick) {
   180→                Icon(
   181→                    imageVector = if (notificationsEnabled)
   182→                        Icons.Default.Notifications
   183→                    else
   184→                        Icons.Default.NotificationsOff,
   185→                    contentDescription = if (notificationsEnabled) "Notifications on" else "Notifications off",
   186→                    tint = if (notificationsEnabled)
   187→                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   188→                    else
   189→                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   190→                )
   191→            }
   192→        }
   193→
   194→        Spacer(Modifier.height(14.dp))
   195→
   196→        Text(
   197→            text = formattedDate,
   198→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
   199→            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   200→        )
   201→
   202→        Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   203→
   204→        val statusLine = when (remainingCount) {
   205→            0    -> "No more events today"
   206→            1    -> "You have 1 event remaining today"
   207→            else -> "You have $remainingCount events remaining today"
   208→        }
   209→        Text(
   210→            text = statusLine,
   211→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   212→            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   213→        )
   214→    }
   215→}
   216→
   217→// ─── Next Event Banner ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   218→
   219→@Composable
   220→private fun NextEventBanner(event: ScheduleEvent, currentTime: LocalTime) {
   221→    val timeFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a")
   222→    val minutesUntil  = Duration.between(currentTime, event.time).toMinutes()
   223→
   224→    val countdownText = when {
   225→        minutesUntil <= 0  -> "Starting now"
   226→        minutesUntil < 60  -> "in $minutesUntil min"
   227→        else -> {
   228→            val h = minutesUntil / 60
   229→            val m = minutesUntil % 60
   230→            if (m == 0L) "in ${h}h" else "in ${h}h ${m}m"
   231→        }
   232→    }
   233→
   234→    Card(
   235→        modifier  = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   236→        shape     = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp),
   237→        colors    = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer),
   238→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = 6.dp)
   239→    ) {
   240→        Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(20.dp)) {
   241→
   242→            // "UP NEXT" label + countdown chip
   243→            Row(
   244→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   245→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   246→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   247→            ) {
   248→                Text(
   249→                    text = "UP NEXT",
   250→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,

1→package com.example.combined_schedule.data
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import com.google.gson.Gson
     5→import com.google.gson.reflect.TypeToken
     6→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
     7→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
     8→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
     9→
    10→class ScheduleEntryRepository(context: Context) {
    11→
    12→    private val prefs = context.getSharedPreferences("schedule_entries_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
    13→    private val gson  = Gson()
    14→    private val listType = object : TypeToken<List<ScheduleEntry>>() {}.type
    15→
    16→    private val _entries = MutableStateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>>(loadAll())
    17→
    18→    init { if (!prefs.getBoolean(KEY_SEEDED, false)) seedDefaults() }
    19→
    20→    fun getAll(): StateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>> = _entries.asStateFlow()
    21→
    22→    private fun loadAll(): List<ScheduleEntry> {
    23→        val json = prefs.getString(KEY, null) ?: return emptyList()
    24→        return gson.fromJson(json, listType) ?: emptyList()
    25→    }
    26→
    27→    private fun saveAll(entries: List<ScheduleEntry>) {
    28→        prefs.edit().putString(KEY, gson.toJson(entries)).apply()
    29→        _entries.value = entries
    30→    }
    31→
    32→    fun insert(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value + entry)
    33→    fun update(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value.map { if (it.id == entry.id) entry else it })
    34→    fun delete(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value.filter { it.id != entry.id })
    35→
    36→    // ── Default holidays ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    37→    private fun seedDefaults() {
    38→        val defaults = listOf(
    39→            holiday("New Year's Day",     "2026-01-01"),
    40→            holiday("MLK Jr. Day",        "2026-01-19"),
    41→            holiday("Valentine's Day",    "2026-02-14"),
    42→            holiday("Spring Break",       "2026-03-14", "UIUC Spring Break begins"),
    43→            holiday("St. Patrick's Day",  "2026-03-17"),
    44→            holiday("Easter",             "2026-04-05"),
    45→            holiday("Earth Day",          "2026-04-22"),
    46→            holiday("Mother's Day",       "2026-05-10"),
    47→            holiday("Memorial Day",       "2026-05-25"),
    48→            holiday("Father's Day",       "2026-06-21"),
    49→            holiday("Independence Day",   "2026-07-04"),
    50→            holiday("Labor Day",          "2026-09-07"),
    51→            holiday("Halloween",          "2026-10-31"),
    52→            holiday("Veterans Day",       "2026-11-11"),
    53→            holiday("Thanksgiving",       "2026-11-26"),
    54→            holiday("Christmas Eve",      "2026-12-24"),
    55→            holiday("Christmas Day",      "2026-12-25"),
    56→            holiday("New Year's Eve",     "2026-12-31")
    57→        )
    58→        saveAll(_entries.value + defaults)
    59→        prefs.edit().putBoolean(KEY_SEEDED, true).apply()
    60→    }
    61→
    62→    private fun holiday(name: String, date: String, desc: String = "") =
    63→        ScheduleEntry(type = EntryType.SPECIAL_EVENT, title = name, description = desc, date = date)
    64→
    65→    companion object {
    66→        private const val KEY        = "all_entries"
    67→        private const val KEY_SEEDED = "seeded_defaults"
    68→
    69→        @Volatile private var INSTANCE: ScheduleEntryRepository? = null
    70→
    71→        fun getInstance(context: Context): ScheduleEntryRepository =
    72→            INSTANCE ?: synchronized(this) {
    73→                ScheduleEntryRepository(context.applicationContext).also { INSTANCE = it }
    74→            }
    75→    }
    76→}
    77→

    66→/** Parse "yyyy-MM-dd" → LocalDate, or null if not parseable. */
    67→fun parseDate(s: String): LocalDate? = try {
    68→    LocalDate.parse(s, DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE)
    69→} catch (_: DateTimeParseException) { null }
    70→
    71→fun formatDisplay(s: String): String {
    72→    val d = parseDate(s) ?: return s
    73→    return d.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("MMM d, yyyy"))
    74→}

    76→// ── Screen ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    77→@Composable
    78→fun ClassScheduleScreen() {
    79→    val context = LocalContext.current
    80→    val vm: ClassScheduleViewModel = viewModel(factory = ClassScheduleViewModel.Factory(context))
    81→    val allEntries by vm.entries.collectAsState()
    82→
    83→    var currentMonth  by remember { mutableStateOf(YearMonth.now()) }
    84→    var selectedDate  by remember { mutableStateOf<LocalDate?>(null) }
    85→    var filterType    by remember { mutableStateOf<EntryType?>(null) }
    86→    var showDialog    by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    87→    var editingEntry  by remember { mutableStateOf<ScheduleEntry?>(null) }
    88→
    89→    // Map date → list of entries for quick calendar dot lookup
    90→    val dateEntryMap = remember(allEntries) {
    91→        allEntries.groupBy { parseDate(it.date) }
    92→    }
    93→
    94→    val displayed = remember(allEntries, selectedDate, filterType) {
    95→        var list = if (selectedDate != null)
    96→            allEntries.filter { parseDate(it.date) == selectedDate }
    97→        else allEntries
    98→        if (filterType != null) list = list.filter { it.type == filterType }
    99→        list.sortedWith(compareBy({ it.date }, { it.time }))
   100→    }
   101→
   102→    Scaffold(
   103→        floatingActionButton = {
   104→            FloatingActionButton(
   105→                onClick = { editingEntry = null; showDialog = true },
   106→                containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   107→            ) { Icon(Icons.Default.Add, "Add entry") }
   108→        }
   109→    ) { innerPadding ->
   110→        LazyColumn(
   111→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize().padding(innerPadding),
   112→            contentPadding = PaddingValues(bottom = 80.dp)
   113→        ) {
   114→
   115→            // ── Calendar ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   116→            item {
   117→                CalendarCard(
   118→                    currentMonth = currentMonth,
   119→                    selectedDate = selectedDate,
   120→                    dateEntryMap = dateEntryMap,
   121→                    onMonthChange = { currentMonth = it },
   122→                    onDateSelected = {
   123→                        selectedDate = if (selectedDate == it) null else it

   125→                )
   126→            }
   127→
   128→            // ── Filter chips ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
   129→            item {
   130→                Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 16.dp)) {
   131→                    Row(
   132→                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   133→                        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   134→                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   135→                    ) {
   136→                        Text(
   137→                            text = if (selectedDate != null)
   138→                                formatDisplay(selectedDate!!.toString())
   139→                            else "All Entries",
   140→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   141→                            fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
   142→                        )
   143→                        if (selectedDate != null) {

   145→                        }
   146→                    }

   151→                        }
   152→                        items(EntryType.entries) { type ->

   162→                            )
   163→                        }
   164→                    }

   166→                }
   167→            }

   169→            // ── Entry list ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
   170→            if (displayed.isEmpty()) {
