   206→
   207→// ── Calendar card ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   208→@Composable
   209→private fun CalendarCard(
   210→    currentMonth: YearMonth,
   211→    selectedDate: LocalDate?,
   212→    dateEntryMap: Map<LocalDate?, List<ScheduleEntry>>,
   213→    onMonthChange: (YearMonth) -> Unit,
   214→    onDateSelected: (LocalDate) -> Unit
   215→) {
   216→    val today = LocalDate.now()
   217→    val firstDay = currentMonth.atDay(1)
   218→    val daysInMonth = currentMonth.lengthOfMonth()
   219→    // Sunday = 0 offset
   220→    val startOffset = (firstDay.dayOfWeek.value % 7)
   221→    val totalCells = startOffset + daysInMonth
   222→
   223→    Card(
   224→        modifier = Modifier
   225→            .fillMaxWidth()
   226→            .padding(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 8.dp),
   227→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(16.dp),
   228→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(4.dp),
   229→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface)
   230→    ) {
   231→        Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)) {
   232→
   233→            // Month navigation
   234→            Row(
   235→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   236→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   237→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   238→            ) {
   239→                IconButton(onClick = { onMonthChange(currentMonth.minusMonths(1)) }) {
   240→                    Icon(Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack, "Previous month")
   241→                }
   242→                Text(
   243→                    text = currentMonth.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("MMMM yyyy")),
   244→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   245→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
   246→                )
   247→                IconButton(onClick = { onMonthChange(currentMonth.plusMonths(1)) }) {
   248→                    Icon(Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowForward, "Next month")
   249→                }
   250→            }
   251→
   252→            // Day-of-week headers
   253→            Row(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()) {
   254→                listOf("S","M","T","W","T","F","S").forEach { day ->
   255→                    Text(
   256→                        text = day,
   257→                        modifier = Modifier.weight(1f),
   258→                        textAlign = TextAlign.Center,
   259→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   260→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   261→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   262→                    )
   263→                }
   264→            }
   265→
   266→            Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   267→
   268→            // Day grid
   269→            val rows = (totalCells + 6) / 7
   270→            for (row in 0 until rows) {
   271→                Row(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()) {
   272→                    for (col in 0 until 7) {
   273→                        val cellIndex = row * 7 + col
   274→                        val dayNumber = cellIndex - startOffset + 1
   275→                        if (dayNumber < 1 || dayNumber > daysInMonth) {
   276→                            Box(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f).aspectRatio(1f))
   277→                        } else {
   278→                            val date = currentMonth.atDay(dayNumber)
   279→                            val entriesOnDay = dateEntryMap[date] ?: emptyList()
   280→                            val isToday = date == today
   281→                            val isSelected = date == selectedDate
   282→
   283→                            DayCell(
   284→                                day = dayNumber,
   285→                                isToday = isToday,
   286→                                isSelected = isSelected,
   287→                                entries = entriesOnDay,
   288→                                modifier = Modifier.weight(1f),
   289→                                onClick = { onDateSelected(date) }
   290→                            )
   291→                        }
   292→                    }
   293→                }
   294→            }
   295→
   296→            // Legend
   297→            Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   298→            HorizontalDivider()
   299→            Spacer(Modifier.height(6.dp))
   300→            Row(
   301→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   302→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceEvenly
   303→            ) {
   304→                EntryType.entries.forEach { type ->
   305→                    Row(
   306→                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   307→                        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   308→                    ) {
   309→                        Box(modifier = Modifier
   310→                            .size(8.dp)
   311→                            .clip(CircleShape)
   312→                            .background(entryColor(type)))
   313→                        Text(entryLabel(type),
   314→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   315→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
   316→                    }
   317→                }
   318→            }
   319→        }
   320→    }
   321→}
   322→
   323→@Composable
   324→private fun DayCell(
   325→    day: Int,
   326→    isToday: Boolean,
   327→    isSelected: Boolean,
   328→    entries: List<ScheduleEntry>,
   329→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
   330→    onClick: () -> Unit
   331→) {
   332→    val dotTypes = entries.map { it.type }.distinct().take(3)
   333→
   334→    Box(
   335→        modifier = modifier
   336→            .aspectRatio(0.72f)
   337→            .clip(RoundedCornerShape(6.dp))
   338→            .then(
   339→                if (isSelected) Modifier.background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary)
   340→                else if (isToday) Modifier.border(1.5.dp, MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary, RoundedCornerShape(6.dp))
   341→                else Modifier
   342→            )
   343→            .clickable(onClick = onClick)
   344→    ) {
   345→        // Day number centered
   346→        Text(
   347→            text = day.toString(),
   348→            fontSize = 13.sp,
   349→            fontWeight = if (isToday || isSelected) FontWeight.Bold else FontWeight.Normal,
   350→            color = if (isSelected) Color.White
   351→                    else if (isToday) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   352→                    else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface,
   353→            modifier = Modifier.align(Alignment.Center)
   354→        )
   355→
   356→        // Colored indicator bars pinned to the bottom
   357→        if (dotTypes.isNotEmpty()) {
   358→            Row(
   359→                modifier = Modifier
   360→                    .align(Alignment.BottomCenter)
   361→                    .fillMaxWidth()
   362→                    .padding(horizontal = 3.dp, vertical = 3.dp),
   363→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(2.dp)
   364→            ) {
   365→                dotTypes.forEach { type ->
   366→                    Box(
   367→                        modifier = Modifier
   368→                            .weight(1f)
   369→                            .height(4.dp)
   370→                            .clip(RoundedCornerShape(2.dp))
   371→                            .background(
   372→                                if (isSelected) Color.White.copy(alpha = 0.85f)
   373→                                else entryColor(type)
   374→                            )
   375→                    )
   376→                }
   377→            }
   378→        }
   379→    }
   380→}
   381→
   382→// ── Entry card ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   383→@Composable
   384→private fun ScheduleEntryCard(
   385→    entry: ScheduleEntry,
   386→    onEdit: () -> Unit,
   387→    onDelete: () -> Unit
   388→) {
   389→    val accent    = entryColor(entry.type)
   390→    val container = entryContainerColor(entry.type)
   391→
   392→    Card(
   393→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().clickable(onClick = onEdit),
   394→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(12.dp),
   395→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = container),
   396→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(2.dp)
   397→    ) {
   398→        Row(modifier = Modifier.height(IntrinsicSize.Min)) {
   399→            Box(modifier = Modifier
   400→                .width(5.dp).fillMaxHeight()
   401→                .background(accent, RoundedCornerShape(topStart = 12.dp, bottomStart = 12.dp)))
   402→
   403→            Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f).padding(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 10.dp)) {
   404→                Row(
   405→                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   406→                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
   407→                ) {
   408→                    Surface(shape = RoundedCornerShape(6.dp), color = accent) {
   409→                        Row(
   410→                            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   411→                            modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 6.dp, vertical = 2.dp),
   412→                            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(3.dp)
   413→                        ) {
   414→                            Icon(entryIcon(entry.type), null,
   415→                                modifier = Modifier.size(11.dp), tint = Color.White)
   416→                            Text(entryLabel(entry.type),
   417→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   418→                                color = Color.White, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold)
   419→                        }
   420→                    }
   421→                    Text(entry.title,
   422→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   423→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   424→                        color = accent)
   425→                }
   426→                if (entry.description.isNotBlank()) {
   427→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(3.dp))
   428→                    Text(entry.description,
   429→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   430→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
   431→                }
   432→                Spacer(Modifier.height(6.dp))
   433→                Row(horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(12.dp)) {
   434→                    if (entry.date.isNotBlank()) {
   435→                        InfoChip(Icons.Default.DateRange, formatDisplay(entry.date), accent)
   436→                    }
   437→                    if (entry.time.isNotBlank()) {
   438→                        InfoChip(Icons.Default.Schedule, entry.time, accent)
   439→                    }
   440→                    if (entry.location.isNotBlank()) {
   441→                        InfoChip(Icons.Default.LocationOn, entry.location, accent)
   442→                    }
   443→                }
   444→            }
   445→
   446→            IconButton(
   447→                onClick = onDelete,
   448→                modifier = Modifier.align(Alignment.CenterVertically)
   449→            ) {
   450→                Icon(Icons.Default.Delete, "Delete",
   451→                    modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp),
   452→                    tint = accent.copy(alpha = 0.4f))
   453→            }
   454→        }
   455→    }
   456→}
   457→
   458→@Composable
   459→private fun InfoChip(icon: androidx.compose.ui.graphics.vector.ImageVector, text: String, color: Color) {
   460→    Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically, horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(3.dp)) {
   461→        Icon(icon, null, modifier = Modifier.size(12.dp), tint = color)
   462→        Text(text, style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall, color = color)
   463→    }
   464→}
   465→
   466→// ── Add / Edit dialog ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   467→@Composable
   468→private fun EntryDialog(
   469→    initial: ScheduleEntry?,
   470→    onDismiss: () -> Unit,
   471→    onConfirm: (ScheduleEntry) -> Unit
   472→) {
   473→    var type        by remember { mutableStateOf(initial?.type        ?: EntryType.COURSE) }
   474→    var title       by remember { mutableStateOf(initial?.title       ?: "") }
   475→    var description by remember { mutableStateOf(initial?.description ?: "") }
   476→    var date        by remember { mutableStateOf(initial?.date        ?: "") }
   477→    var time        by remember { mutableStateOf(initial?.time        ?: "") }
   478→    var location    by remember { mutableStateOf(initial?.location    ?: "") }
   479→
   480→    AlertDialog(
   481→        onDismissRequest = onDismiss,
   482→        title = { Text(if (initial == null) "Add Entry" else "Edit Entry") },
   483→        text = {
   484→            Column(verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(10.dp)) {
   485→                Text("Type", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
   486→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
   487→                Row(horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(6.dp)) {
   488→                    EntryType.entries.forEach { t ->
   489→                        FilterChip(
   490→                            selected = type == t,
   491→                            onClick = { type = t },
   492→                            label = { Text(entryLabel(t), style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall) },
   493→                            colors = FilterChipDefaults.filterChipColors(
   494→                                selectedContainerColor = entryColor(t),
   495→                                selectedLabelColor = Color.White
   496→                            )
   497→                        )
   498→                    }
   499→                }
   500→                OutlinedTextField(value = title, onValueChange = { title = it },
   501→                    label = { Text("Title *") }, singleLine = true,
   502→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth())
   503→                OutlinedTextField(value = description, onValueChange = { description = it },
   504→                    label = { Text("Description") }, maxLines = 2,
   505→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth())
   506→                Row(horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)) {
   507→                    OutlinedTextField(value = date, onValueChange = { date = it },
   508→                        label = { Text("Date") },
   509→                        placeholder = { Text("YYYY-MM-DD", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall) },
   510→                        singleLine = true, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
   511→                    OutlinedTextField(value = time, onValueChange = { time = it },
   512→                        label = { Text("Time") },
   513→                        placeholder = { Text("9:00 AM", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall) },
   514→                        singleLine = true, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
   515→                }
   516→                OutlinedTextField(value = location, onValueChange = { location = it },
   517→                    label = { Text("Location") }, singleLine = true,
   518→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth())
   519→            }
   520→        },
   521→        confirmButton = {
   522→            TextButton(
   523→                onClick = {
   524→                    onConfirm(ScheduleEntry(
   525→                        id          = initial?.id ?: java.util.UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
   526→                        type        = type,
   527→                        title       = title.trim(),
   528→                        description = description.trim(),
   529→                        date        = date.trim(),
   530→                        time        = time.trim(),
   531→                        location    = location.trim()
   532→                    ))
   533→                },
   534→                enabled = title.isNotBlank()
   535→            ) { Text(if (initial == null) "Add" else "Save") }
   536→        },
   537→        dismissButton = { TextButton(onClick = onDismiss) { Text("Cancel") } }
   538→    )
   539→}

    23→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)

    25→fun CourseDetailScreen(

    33→    )

    38→    Scaffold(

    44→                        Icon(Icons.Default.ArrowBack, contentDescription = "Back")

    46→                },

    53→        floatingActionButton = {

    59→            }
    60→        }
    61→    ) { innerPadding ->
    62→        LazyColumn(
    63→            modifier = Modifier
    64→                .fillMaxSize()

    66→            contentPadding = PaddingValues(16.dp),
    67→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(10.dp)
    68→        ) {

    71→                if (event != null) {
    72→                    CourseInfoCard(event)
    73→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
    74→                    Text(
    75→                        text = "Works & Assignments",
    76→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    77→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
    78→                    )
    79→                }
    80→            }
    81→
    82→            if (works.isEmpty()) {
    83→                item {
    84→                    Box(
    85→                        modifier = Modifier
    86→                            .fillMaxWidth()
    87→                            .padding(vertical = 32.dp),
    88→                        contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
    89→                    ) {
    90→                        Text(
    91→                            text = "No assignments yet. Tap + to add one.",
    92→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
    93→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
    94→                        )
    95→                    }
    96→                }
    97→            } else {
    98→                items(works, key = { it.id }) { work ->
    99→                    WorkItem(
   100→                        work = work,

   107→            item { Spacer(Modifier.height(72.dp)) }

   111→    if (showAddDialog) {

   117→            }
   118→        )
   119→    }
   120→}

## COMPREHENSIVE ANDROID PROJECT EXPLORATION REPORT

### Project Overview
This is a **Combined Schedule** Android app built with **Jetpack Compose** and **Material Design 3**. It's a multi-screen schedule management app that combines class schedules, assignments, bus routes, and custom events.

---

## 1. CURRENT BUS SCHEDULE TAB STATE

**File:** `/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/app/src/main/java/com/example/combined_schedule/ui/screens/BusScheduleScreen.kt`

The Bus Schedule screen is currently **a minimal placeholder**:
```kotlin
@Composable
fun BusScheduleScreen() {

        modifier = Modifier

            .padding(16.dp),
        horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
        verticalArrangement = Arrangement.Center
    ) {

            text = "Bus Schedule",

        )

            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant

```

**Status:** Shows just a centered heading and description. No actual bus data is displayed.

## 2. HOW BUS EVENTS ARE CURRENTLY MODELED

**File:** `/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/app/src/main/java/com/example/combined_schedule/data/SampleEventRepository.kt`

Bus events are modeled as **ScheduleEvent** objects with an `isBus` flag:

```kotlin
object SampleEventRepository {
    val events = listOf(
        ScheduleEvent(1, "MATH 241 Lecture",   LocalTime.of(9, 0),  "Altgeld Hall 141",    isBus = false, reminderEnabled = true),
        ScheduleEvent(2, "22 Illini Bus",       LocalTime.of(10, 30),"Green & Wright Stop", isBus = true,  reminderEnabled = false),
        ScheduleEvent(3, "CS 124 Lab",          LocalTime.of(13, 0), "Siebel Center 0216",  isBus = false, reminderEnabled = true),
        ScheduleEvent(4, "PHYS 212 Discussion", LocalTime.of(15, 0), "Loomis Lab 141",      isBus = false, reminderEnabled = false),
    )

    fun findById(id: Int): ScheduleEvent? = events.find { it.id == id }
}
```

**Data Model** (defined in `HomeScreen.kt`):
```kotlin
data class ScheduleEvent(
    val id: Int,
    val title: String,
    val time: LocalTime,
    val location: String,
    val isBus: Boolean,
    val reminderEnabled: Boolean
)
```

**Current Sample Data:**
- Only **one bus event** in the sample: "22 Illini Bus" at 10:30 at "Green & Wright Stop"
- Bus events use the 🚌 emoji as the icon
- No route number parsing or structured bus data (just a title string)

---

## 3. HOW BUS EVENTS ARE SHOWN IN HOMESCREEN

**File:** `/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/app/src/main/java/com/example/combined_schedule/ui/screens/HomeScreen.kt`

Bus events are treated **identically to class events** in the HomeScreen:

1. **In the "UP NEXT" banner** (lines 273-289):
   - Shows emoji icon: `if (event.isBus) "🚌" else "📚"`
   - Displays title, time, and location
   - Shows countdown timer

2. **In the event list items** (lines 340-408):
   - Shows the 🚌 emoji
   - Displays title, time, and location
   - Shows reminder bell (on/off)
   - **Key difference:** Bus events are NOT clickable (line 347):
     ```kotlin
     .then(if (!event.isBus) Modifier.clickable(onClick = onClick) else Modifier)
     ```

3. **Filtering:**
   - All events (bus and class) are shown in the same list
   - No separate filtering for bus vs. class events in HomeScreen
   - Past vs. upcoming separation applies to both

---

## 4. ARCHITECTURE PATTERNS IN THE CODEBASE

### Repository Pattern with Gson + SharedPreferences

Two main data repositories exist:

**A) SampleEventRepository** (used by HomeScreen)
- Object singleton (stateless)
- Hardcoded in-memory list of `ScheduleEvent` objects
- Simple `findById()` function
- No persistence (data not saved)

**B) ScheduleEntryRepository** (used by ClassScheduleScreen)
```kotlin
class ScheduleEntryRepository(context: Context) {
    private val prefs = context.getSharedPreferences("schedule_entries_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
    private val gson = Gson()
    private val listType = object : TypeToken<List<ScheduleEntry>>() {}.type
    
    private val _entries = MutableStateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>>(loadAll())
    
    fun getAll(): StateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>> = _entries.asStateFlow()
    fun insert(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value + entry)
    fun update(entry: ScheduleEntry) = ...
    fun delete(entry: ScheduleEntry) = ...
}
```
- **Persistence:** Gson serialization + SharedPreferences
- **Reactivity:** Uses Kotlin `StateFlow` for reactive updates
- **Singleton pattern:** Lazy initialization with thread-safe instance
- **Seed defaults:** Loads holiday data on first run

**C) WorkRepository** (for assignments/works within courses)
- Same pattern as ScheduleEntryRepository
- Filters works by course title
- Used by CourseDetailViewModel

### ViewModel Pattern

Example: **ClassScheduleViewModel**
```kotlin
class ClassScheduleViewModel(private val repo: ScheduleEntryRepository) : ViewModel() {
    val entries: StateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>> = repo.getAll()
    
    fun insert(entry: ScheduleEntry) = repo.insert(entry)
    fun update(entry: ScheduleEntry) = repo.update(entry)
    fun delete(entry: ScheduleEntry) = repo.delete(entry)
    
    class Factory(private val context: Context) : ViewModelProvider.Factory { ... }
}
```

- **Factory pattern:** Custom `ViewModelProvider.Factory` for dependency injection
- **StateFlow exposure:** Exposes repo data as reactive flow
- **Context passing:** Gets context from LocalContext.current in Compose
- **Simple delegation:** VM mostly delegates to repo

### Data Models

**ScheduleEntry** (for class schedule calendar):
```kotlin
data class ScheduleEntry(
    val id: String = UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
    val type: EntryType,  // COURSE, ASSIGNMENT, SPECIAL_EVENT
    val title: String,
    val description: String = "",
    val date: String = "",      // "yyyy-MM-dd"
    val time: String = "",      // "9:00 AM"
    val location: String = ""
)
```

**Work** (for assignments within a course):
```kotlin
data class Work(
    val id: String = UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
    val courseTitle: String,    // Links to which course
    val title: String,
    val description: String = "",
    val dueDate: String = "",
    val isCompleted: Boolean = false
)
```

---

## 5. PATTERNS USED IN CLASSSCHEDULESCREEN (for reference)

**File:** `/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/app/src/main/java/com/example/combined_schedule/ui/screens/ClassScheduleScreen.kt`

This screen demonstrates sophisticated patterns relevant to a Bus Schedule:

**Calendar Visualization:**
- Interactive month picker (prev/next arrows)
- Calendar grid with visual indicators (dots for entry types)
- Today highlight + selected date highlight
- Date → entries mapping for efficient lookup

**Filtering:**
- Filter chips for `EntryType` (COURSE, ASSIGNMENT, SPECIAL_EVENT)
- Single-select filtering (click to toggle on/off)
- Date selection filter (click a date to toggle selection)

**Entry Display:**
- Color-coded cards by type
- Icon + type label badges
- Action buttons (edit/delete)
- Custom dialog for add/edit

**Key Functions:**
```kotlin

fun entryContainerColor(type: EntryType) = when(type) { ... }
fun parseDate(s: String): LocalDate? = ...
fun formatDisplay(s: String): String = ...
```

## 6. NAVIGATION SETUP

**File:** `/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/MainActivity.kt`

```kotlin
sealed class Screen(val route: String, val label: String, val icon: ImageVector) {
    object Home : Screen("home", "Home", Icons.Default.Home)
    object Classes : Screen("classes", "Classes", Icons.Default.DateRange)
    object Bus : Screen("bus", "Bus", Icons.Default.LocationOn)
    object AddEdit : Screen("add_edit", "Add/Edit", Icons.Default.Add)
    object Notifications : Screen("notifications", "Alerts", Icons.Default.Notifications)
    object CourseDetail : Screen("course_detail/{eventId}", "", Icons.Default.DateRange) { ... }
}

val bottomNavItems = listOf(Screen.Home, Screen.Classes, Screen.Bus, Screen.AddEdit, Screen.Notifications)
```

- **Bottom navigation bar** with 5 main tabs
- **Bus tab** uses `LocationOn` icon
- **Detail screen** (CourseDetail) hides bottom nav
- Navigation is state-saved and top-level

---

## 7. WHAT WOULD MAKE SENSE FOR A BUS SCHEDULE TAB

Based on the patterns established in this codebase, here are sensible approaches:

### Option A: Lightweight (Minimal Data Model)
- Extend `ScheduleEvent` with optional bus-specific fields (route number, direction)
- Create a `BusEventRepository` similar to `SampleEventRepository` but persistent
- Filter HomeScreen's bus events and display them in BusScheduleScreen with additional details
- Add "Favorites" toggle (flag in data model)

### Option B: Structured Bus Data (Recommended)
- Create a new `BusRoute` data class:
  ```kotlin
  data class BusRoute(
      val id: String = UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
      val routeNumber: String,      // "22 Illini"
      val direction: String = "",   // "North-South"
      val stops: List<String>,      // List of stop names
      val isFavorite: Boolean = false
  )
  
  data class BusStop(
      val routeId: String,
      val stopName: String,
      val nextArrivalTime: LocalTime,
      val isArrivingSoon: Boolean = false
  )
  ```
- Use **BusRepository** with SharedPreferences + Gson (following WorkRepository pattern)
- Display routes in a list, tap to see stops with times
- Add favorites functionality
- Optional: Real-time data integration (API calls for arrival times)

### Option C: Integration with HomeScreen
- Keep bus routes in a separate persistent repository
- Show **favorited bus routes** in HomeScreen's "upcoming events"
- Display specific bus stops as time-based events (like classes)
- Use Bus tab for full route catalog and managing favorites

### 3. Data Models (ScheduleEntry.kt, Work.kt)

### 4. ScheduleEntryRepository.kt
```kotlin
package com.example.combined_schedule.data

import android.content.Context
import com.google.gson.Gson
import com.google.gson.reflect.TypeToken
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow

class ScheduleEntryRepository(context: Context) {

    private val prefs = context.getSharedPreferences("schedule_entries_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
    private val gson  = Gson()
    private val listType = object : TypeToken<List<ScheduleEntry>>() {}.type

    private val _entries = MutableStateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>>(loadAll())

    init { if (!prefs.getBoolean(KEY_SEEDED, false)) seedDefaults() }

    fun getAll(): StateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>> = _entries.asStateFlow()

    private fun loadAll(): List<ScheduleEntry> {
        val json = prefs.getString(KEY, null) ?: return emptyList()
        return gson.fromJson(json, listType) ?: emptyList()
    }

    private fun saveAll(entries: List<ScheduleEntry>) {
        prefs.edit().putString(KEY, gson.toJson(entries)).apply()
        _entries.value = entries
    }

    fun insert(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value + entry)
    fun update(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value.map { if (it.id == entry.id) entry else it })
    fun delete(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value.filter { it.id != entry.id })

    // ── Default holidays ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private fun seedDefaults() {
        val defaults = listOf(
            holiday("New Year's Day",     "2026-01-01"),
            holiday("MLK Jr. Day",        "2026-01-19"),
            holiday("Valentine's Day",    "2026-02-14"),
            holiday("Spring Break",       "2026-03-14", "UIUC Spring Break begins"),
            holiday("St. Patrick's Day",  "2026-03-17"),
            holiday("Easter",             "2026-04-05"),
            holiday("Earth Day",          "2026-04-22"),
            holiday("Mother's Day",       "2026-05-10"),
            holiday("Memorial Day",       "2026-05-25"),
            holiday("Father's Day",       "2026-06-21"),
            holiday("Independence Day",   "2026-07-04"),
            holiday("Labor Day",          "2026-09-07"),
            holiday("Halloween",          "2026-10-31"),
            holiday("Veterans Day",       "2026-11-11"),
            holiday("Thanksgiving",       "2026-11-26"),
            holiday("Christmas Eve",      "2026-12-24"),
            holiday("Christmas Day",      "2026-12-25"),
            holiday("New Year's Eve",     "2026-12-31")
        )
        saveAll(_entries.value + defaults)
        prefs.edit().putBoolean(KEY_SEEDED, true).apply()
    }

    private fun holiday(name: String, date: String, desc: String = "") =
        ScheduleEntry(type = EntryType.SPECIAL_EVENT, title = name, description = desc, date = date)

    companion object {
        private const val KEY        = "all_entries"
        private const val KEY_SEEDED = "seeded_defaults"

        @Volatile private var INSTANCE: ScheduleEntryRepository? = null

        fun getInstance(context: Context): ScheduleEntryRepository =
            INSTANCE ?: synchronized(this) {
                ScheduleEntryRepository(context.applicationContext).also { INSTANCE = it }
            }
    }
}
```

### 5. WorkRepository.kt
```kotlin
package com.example.combined_schedule.data

import android.content.Context
import com.google.gson.Gson
import com.google.gson.reflect.TypeToken
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow

class WorkRepository(context: Context) {

    private val prefs = context.getSharedPreferences("works_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
    private val gson = Gson()
    private val listType = object : TypeToken<List<Work>>() {}.type

    private val _works = MutableStateFlow<List<Work>>(loadAll())

    private fun loadAll(): List<Work> {
        val json = prefs.getString(KEY_WORKS, null) ?: return emptyList()
        return gson.fromJson(json, listType) ?: emptyList()
    }

    private fun saveAll(works: List<Work>) {
        prefs.edit().putString(KEY_WORKS, gson.toJson(works)).apply()
        _works.value = works
    }

    fun worksForCourse(courseTitle: String): StateFlow<List<Work>> {
        return _works.asStateFlow()
    }

    fun getAll(): StateFlow<List<Work>> = _works.asStateFlow()

    fun insert(work: Work) {
        saveAll(_works.value + work)
    }

    fun update(work: Work) {
        saveAll(_works.value.map { if (it.id == work.id) work else it })
    }

    fun delete(work: Work) {
        saveAll(_works.value.filter { it.id != work.id })
    }

    companion object {
        private const val KEY_WORKS = "all_works"

        @Volatile
        private var INSTANCE: WorkRepository? = null

        fun getInstance(context: Context): WorkRepository =
            INSTANCE ?: synchronized(this) {
                WorkRepository(context.applicationContext).also { INSTANCE = it }
            }
    }
}
```

**Data Model** (defined in `HomeScreen.kt`):
```kotlin
data class ScheduleEvent(
    val id: Int,
    val title: String,
    val time: LocalTime,
    val location: String,
    val isBus: Boolean,
    val reminderEnabled: Boolean
)
```

**Current Sample Data:**
- Only **one bus event** in the sample: "22 Illini Bus" at 10:30 at "Green & Wright Stop"
- Bus events use the 🚌 emoji as the icon
- No route number parsing or structured bus data (just a title string)

---

## 3. HOW BUS EVENTS ARE SHOWN IN HOMESCREEN

**File:** `/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/app/src/main/java/com/example/combined_schedule/ui/screens/HomeScreen.kt`

Bus events are treated **identically to class events** in the HomeScreen:

1. **In the "UP NEXT" banner** (lines 273-289):
   - Shows emoji icon: `if (event.isBus) "🚌" else "📚"`
   - Displays title, time, and location
   - Shows countdown timer

2. **In the event list items** (lines 340-408):
   - Shows the 🚌 emoji
   - Displays title, time, and location
   - Shows reminder bell (on/off)
   - **Key difference:** Bus events are NOT clickable (line 347):
     ```kotlin
     .then(if (!event.isBus) Modifier.clickable(onClick = onClick) else Modifier)
     ```

3. **Filtering:**
   - All events (bus and class) are shown in the same list
   - No separate filtering for bus vs. class events in HomeScreen
   - Past vs. upcoming separation applies to both

---

## 4. ARCHITECTURE PATTERNS IN THE CODEBASE

### Repository Pattern with Gson + SharedPreferences

Two main data repositories exist:

**A) SampleEventRepository** (used by HomeScreen)
- Object singleton (stateless)
- Hardcoded in-memory list of `ScheduleEvent` objects
- Simple `findById()` function
- No persistence (data not saved)

**B) ScheduleEntryRepository** (used by ClassScheduleScreen)
```kotlin
class ScheduleEntryRepository(context: Context) {
    private val prefs = context.getSharedPreferences("schedule_entries_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
    private val gson = Gson()
    private val listType = object : TypeToken<List<ScheduleEntry>>() {}.type
    
    private val _entries = MutableStateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>>(loadAll())
    
    fun getAll(): StateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>> = _entries.asStateFlow()
    fun insert(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value + entry)
    fun update(entry: ScheduleEntry) = ...
    fun delete(entry: ScheduleEntry) = ...
}
```
- **Persistence:** Gson serialization + SharedPreferences
- **Reactivity:** Uses Kotlin `StateFlow` for reactive updates
- **Singleton pattern:** Lazy initialization with thread-safe instance
- **Seed defaults:** Loads holiday data on first run

**C) WorkRepository** (for assignments/works within courses)
- Same pattern as ScheduleEntryRepository
- Filters works by course title
- Used by CourseDetailViewModel

### ViewModel Pattern

Example: **ClassScheduleViewModel**
```kotlin
class ClassScheduleViewModel(private val repo: ScheduleEntryRepository) : ViewModel() {
    val entries: StateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>> = repo.getAll()
    
    fun insert(entry: ScheduleEntry) = repo.insert(entry)
    fun update(entry: ScheduleEntry) = repo.update(entry)
    fun delete(entry: ScheduleEntry) = repo.delete(entry)
    
    class Factory(private val context: Context) : ViewModelProvider.Factory { ... }
}
```

- **Factory pattern:** Custom `ViewModelProvider.Factory` for dependency injection
- **StateFlow exposure:** Exposes repo data as reactive flow
- **Context passing:** Gets context from LocalContext.current in Compose
- **Simple delegation:** VM mostly delegates to repo

### Data Models

**ScheduleEntry** (for class schedule calendar):
```kotlin
data class ScheduleEntry(
    val id: String = UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
    val type: EntryType,  // COURSE, ASSIGNMENT, SPECIAL_EVENT
    val title: String,
    val description: String = "",
    val date: String = "",      // "yyyy-MM-dd"
    val time: String = "",      // "9:00 AM"
    val location: String = ""
)
```

**Work** (for assignments within a course):
```kotlin
data class Work(
    val id: String = UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
    val courseTitle: String,    // Links to which course
    val title: String,
    val description: String = "",
    val dueDate: String = "",
    val isCompleted: Boolean = false
)
```

---

**File:** `/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/app/src/main/java/com/example/combined_schedule/ui/screens/ClassScheduleScreen.kt`

This screen demonstrates sophisticated patterns relevant to a Bus Schedule:

**Calendar Visualization:**
- Interactive month picker (prev/next arrows)

- Date → entries mapping for efficient lookup

**Filtering:**
- Filter chips for `EntryType` (COURSE, ASSIGNMENT, SPECIAL_EVENT)

**Key Functions:**

```kotlin
fun entryContainerColor(type: EntryType) = when(type) { ... }
fun parseDate(s: String): LocalDate? = ...

```

## 6. NAVIGATION SETUP

**File:** `/Users/hukaikun/Desktop/kevin in UIUC/CS124/124_project/MainActivity.kt`

```kotlin
sealed class Screen(val route: String, val label: String, val icon: ImageVector) {
    object Home : Screen("home", "Home", Icons.Default.Home)
    object Classes : Screen("classes", "Classes", Icons.Default.DateRange)

```

- **Bottom navigation bar** with 5 main tabs
- **Bus tab** uses `LocationOn` icon
- **Detail screen** (CourseDetail) hides bottom nav
- Navigation is state-saved and top-level

---

## 7. WHAT WOULD MAKE SENSE FOR A BUS SCHEDULE TAB

Based on the patterns established in this codebase, here are sensible approaches:

### Option A: Lightweight (Minimal Data Model)
- Extend `ScheduleEvent` with optional bus-specific fields (route number, direction)
- Create a `BusEventRepository` similar to `SampleEventRepository` but persistent
- Filter HomeScreen's bus events and display them in BusScheduleScreen with additional details
- Add "Favorites" toggle (flag in data model)

### Option B: Structured Bus Data (Recommended)
- Create a new `BusRoute` data class:
  ```kotlin
  data class BusRoute(
      val id: String = UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
      val routeNumber: String,      // "22 Illini"
      val direction: String = "",   // "North-South"
      val stops: List<String>,      // List of stop names
      val isFavorite: Boolean = false
  )
  
  data class BusStop(
      val routeId: String,
      val stopName: String,
      val nextArrivalTime: LocalTime,
      val isArrivingSoon: Boolean = false
  )
  ```
- Use **BusRepository** with SharedPreferences + Gson (following WorkRepository pattern)
- Display routes in a list, tap to see stops with times
- Add favorites functionality
- Optional: Real-time data integration (API calls for arrival times)

### Option C: Integration with HomeScreen
- Keep bus routes in a separate persistent repository
- Show **favorited bus routes** in HomeScreen's "upcoming events"
- Display specific bus stops as time-based events (like classes)
- Use Bus tab for full route catalog and managing favorites

---

### 3. Data Models (ScheduleEntry.kt, Work.kt)

### 4. ScheduleEntryRepository.kt
```kotlin
package com.example.combined_schedule.data

import android.content.Context
import com.google.gson.Gson
import com.google.gson.reflect.TypeToken
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow

class ScheduleEntryRepository(context: Context) {

    private val prefs = context.getSharedPreferences("schedule_entries_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
    private val gson  = Gson()
    private val listType = object : TypeToken<List<ScheduleEntry>>() {}.type

    private val _entries = MutableStateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>>(loadAll())

    init { if (!prefs.getBoolean(KEY_SEEDED, false)) seedDefaults() }

    fun getAll(): StateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>> = _entries.asStateFlow()

    private fun loadAll(): List<ScheduleEntry> {
        val json = prefs.getString(KEY, null) ?: return emptyList()
        return gson.fromJson(json, listType) ?: emptyList()
    }

    private fun saveAll(entries: List<ScheduleEntry>) {
        prefs.edit().putString(KEY, gson.toJson(entries)).apply()
        _entries.value = entries
    }

    fun insert(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value + entry)
    fun update(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value.map { if (it.id == entry.id) entry else it })
    fun delete(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value.filter { it.id != entry.id })

    // ── Default holidays ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private fun seedDefaults() {
        val defaults = listOf(
            holiday("New Year's Day",     "2026-01-01"),
            holiday("MLK Jr. Day",        "2026-01-19"),
            holiday("Valentine's Day",    "2026-02-14"),
            holiday("Spring Break",       "2026-03-14", "UIUC Spring Break begins"),
            holiday("St. Patrick's Day",  "2026-03-17"),
            holiday("Easter",             "2026-04-05"),
            holiday("Earth Day",          "2026-04-22"),
            holiday("Mother's Day",       "2026-05-10"),
            holiday("Memorial Day",       "2026-05-25"),
            holiday("Father's Day",       "2026-06-21"),
            holiday("Independence Day",   "2026-07-04"),
            holiday("Labor Day",          "2026-09-07"),
            holiday("Halloween",          "2026-10-31"),
            holiday("Veterans Day",       "2026-11-11"),
            holiday("Thanksgiving",       "2026-11-26"),
            holiday("Christmas Eve",      "2026-12-24"),
            holiday("Christmas Day",      "2026-12-25"),
            holiday("New Year's Eve",     "2026-12-31")
        )
        saveAll(_entries.value + defaults)
        prefs.edit().putBoolean(KEY_SEEDED, true).apply()
    }

    private fun holiday(name: String, date: String, desc: String = "") =
        ScheduleEntry(type = EntryType.SPECIAL_EVENT, title = name, description = desc, date = date)

    companion object {
        private const val KEY        = "all_entries"
        private const val KEY_SEEDED = "seeded_defaults"

        @Volatile private var INSTANCE: ScheduleEntryRepository? = null

        fun getInstance(context: Context): ScheduleEntryRepository =
            INSTANCE ?: synchronized(this) {
                ScheduleEntryRepository(context.applicationContext).also { INSTANCE = it }
            }
    }
}
```

### 5. WorkRepository.kt
```kotlin
package com.example.combined_schedule.data

import android.content.Context
import com.google.gson.Gson
import com.google.gson.reflect.TypeToken
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow

class WorkRepository(context: Context) {

    private val prefs = context.getSharedPreferences("works_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
    private val gson = Gson()
    private val listType = object : TypeToken<List<Work>>() {}.type

    private val _works = MutableStateFlow<List<Work>>(loadAll())

    private fun loadAll(): List<Work> {
        val json = prefs.getString(KEY_WORKS, null) ?: return emptyList()
        return gson.fromJson(json, listType) ?: emptyList()
    }

    private fun saveAll(works: List<Work>) {
        prefs.edit().putString(KEY_WORKS, gson.toJson(works)).apply()
        _works.value = works
    }

    fun worksForCourse(courseTitle: String): StateFlow<List<Work>> {
        return _works.asStateFlow()
    }

    fun getAll(): StateFlow<List<Work>> = _works.asStateFlow()

    fun insert(work: Work) {
        saveAll(_works.value + work)
    }

    fun update(work: Work) {
        saveAll(_works.value.map { if (it.id == work.id) work else it })
    }

    fun delete(work: Work) {
        saveAll(_works.value.filter { it.id != work.id })
    }

    companion object {
        private const val KEY_WORKS = "all_works"

        @Volatile
        private var INSTANCE: WorkRepository? = null

        fun getInstance(context: Context): WorkRepository =
            INSTANCE ?: synchronized(this) {
                WorkRepository(context.applicationContext).also { INSTANCE = it }
            }
    }
}
```

---

## KEY TAKEAWAYS

| Aspect | Current State | Pattern |
|--------|---------------|---------|
| **Bus Tab** | Placeholder only | Needs implementation |
| **Bus Data** | Single hardcoded event | SampleEventRepository (in-memory) |
| **Bus Display** | Not shown in tab | Shows in HomeScreen as ScheduleEvent with `isBus=true` |
| **Data Persistence** | None for buses | Gson + SharedPreferences (like ScheduleEntry) |
| **State Management** | N/A | StateFlow + ViewModel Factory |
| **UI Pattern** | Minimalist | Compose + Material 3 |
| **Calendar/Filtering** | ClassScheduleScreen reference | Color-coded types + interactive filtering |

The codebase is well-structured and ready for bus schedule implementation using the existing Repository + ViewModel + StateFlow patterns.

1→package com.example.combined_schedule.data
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import com.google.gson.Gson
     5→import com.google.gson.reflect.TypeToken
     6→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
     7→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
     8→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
     9→
    10→class ScheduleEntryRepository(context: Context) {
    11→
    12→    private val prefs = context.getSharedPreferences("schedule_entries_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
    13→    private val gson  = Gson()
    14→    private val listType = object : TypeToken<List<ScheduleEntry>>() {}.type
    15→
    16→    private val _entries = MutableStateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>>(loadAll())
    17→
    18→    init { if (!prefs.getBoolean(KEY_SEEDED, false)) seedDefaults() }
    19→
    20→    fun getAll(): StateFlow<List<ScheduleEntry>> = _entries.asStateFlow()
    21→
    22→    private fun loadAll(): List<ScheduleEntry> {
    23→        val json = prefs.getString(KEY, null) ?: return emptyList()
    24→        return gson.fromJson(json, listType) ?: emptyList()
    25→    }
    26→
    27→    private fun saveAll(entries: List<ScheduleEntry>) {
    28→        prefs.edit().putString(KEY, gson.toJson(entries)).apply()
    29→        _entries.value = entries
    30→    }
    31→
    32→    fun insert(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value + entry)
    33→    fun update(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value.map { if (it.id == entry.id) entry else it })
    34→    fun delete(entry: ScheduleEntry) = saveAll(_entries.value.filter { it.id != entry.id })
    35→
    36→    // ── Default holidays ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    37→    private fun seedDefaults() {
    38→        val defaults = listOf(
    39→            holiday("New Year's Day",     "2026-01-01"),
    40→            holiday("MLK Jr. Day",        "2026-01-19"),
    41→            holiday("Valentine's Day",    "2026-02-14"),
    42→            holiday("Spring Break",       "2026-03-14", "UIUC Spring Break begins"),
    43→            holiday("St. Patrick's Day",  "2026-03-17"),
    44→            holiday("Easter",             "2026-04-05"),
    45→            holiday("Earth Day",          "2026-04-22"),
    46→            holiday("Mother's Day",       "2026-05-10"),
    47→            holiday("Memorial Day",       "2026-05-25"),
    48→            holiday("Father's Day",       "2026-06-21"),
    49→            holiday("Independence Day",   "2026-07-04"),
    50→            holiday("Labor Day",          "2026-09-07"),
    51→            holiday("Halloween",          "2026-10-31"),
    52→            holiday("Veterans Day",       "2026-11-11"),
    53→            holiday("Thanksgiving",       "2026-11-26"),
    54→            holiday("Christmas Eve",      "2026-12-24"),
    55→            holiday("Christmas Day",      "2026-12-25"),
    56→            holiday("New Year's Eve",     "2026-12-31")
    57→        )
    58→        saveAll(_entries.value + defaults)
    59→        prefs.edit().putBoolean(KEY_SEEDED, true).apply()
    60→    }
    61→
    62→    private fun holiday(name: String, date: String, desc: String = "") =
    63→        ScheduleEntry(type = EntryType.SPECIAL_EVENT, title = name, description = desc, date = date)
    64→
    65→    companion object {
    66→        private const val KEY        = "all_entries"
    67→        private const val KEY_SEEDED = "seeded_defaults"
    68→
    69→        @Volatile private var INSTANCE: ScheduleEntryRepository? = null
    70→
    71→        fun getInstance(context: Context): ScheduleEntryRepository =
    72→            INSTANCE ?: synchronized(this) {
    73→                ScheduleEntryRepository(context.applicationContext).also { INSTANCE = it }
    74→            }
    75→    }
    76→}
    77→

    66→/** Parse "yyyy-MM-dd" → LocalDate, or null if not parseable. */
    67→fun parseDate(s: String): LocalDate? = try {
    68→    LocalDate.parse(s, DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE)
    69→} catch (_: DateTimeParseException) { null }

    71→fun formatDisplay(s: String): String {
    72→    val d = parseDate(s) ?: return s
    73→    return d.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("MMM d, yyyy"))

    76→// ── Screen ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    77→@Composable
    78→fun ClassScheduleScreen() {
    79→    val context = LocalContext.current
    80→    val vm: ClassScheduleViewModel = viewModel(factory = ClassScheduleViewModel.Factory(context))
    81→    val allEntries by vm.entries.collectAsState()
    82→
    83→    var currentMonth  by remember { mutableStateOf(YearMonth.now()) }
    84→    var selectedDate  by remember { mutableStateOf<LocalDate?>(null) }
    85→    var filterType    by remember { mutableStateOf<EntryType?>(null) }
    86→    var showDialog    by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    87→    var editingEntry  by remember { mutableStateOf<ScheduleEntry?>(null) }
    88→
    89→    // Map date → list of entries for quick calendar dot lookup
    90→    val dateEntryMap = remember(allEntries) {
    91→        allEntries.groupBy { parseDate(it.date) }
    92→    }
    93→
    94→    val displayed = remember(allEntries, selectedDate, filterType) {
    95→        var list = if (selectedDate != null)
    96→            allEntries.filter { parseDate(it.date) == selectedDate }
    97→        else allEntries
    98→        if (filterType != null) list = list.filter { it.type == filterType }
    99→        list.sortedWith(compareBy({ it.date }, { it.time }))
   100→    }
   101→
   102→    Scaffold(
   103→        floatingActionButton = {
   104→            FloatingActionButton(
   105→                onClick = { editingEntry = null; showDialog = true },
   106→                containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   107→            ) { Icon(Icons.Default.Add, "Add entry") }
   108→        }
   109→    ) { innerPadding ->
   110→        LazyColumn(
   111→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize().padding(innerPadding),
   112→            contentPadding = PaddingValues(bottom = 80.dp)
   113→        ) {
   114→
   115→            // ── Calendar ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   116→            item {
   117→                CalendarCard(
   118→                    currentMonth = currentMonth,
   119→                    selectedDate = selectedDate,
   120→                    dateEntryMap = dateEntryMap,
   121→                    onMonthChange = { currentMonth = it },
   122→                    onDateSelected = {
   123→                        selectedDate = if (selectedDate == it) null else it
   124→                    }
   125→                )
   126→            }
   127→
   128→            // ── Filter chips ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
   129→            item {
   130→                Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 16.dp)) {
   131→                    Row(
   132→                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   133→                        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   134→                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   135→                    ) {
   136→                        Text(
   137→                            text = if (selectedDate != null)
   138→                                formatDisplay(selectedDate!!.toString())
   139→                            else "All Entries",
   140→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   141→                            fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
   142→                        )
   143→                        if (selectedDate != null) {
   144→                            TextButton(onClick = { selectedDate = null }) { Text("Clear") }
   145→                        }
   146→                    }
   147→                    LazyRow(horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)) {
   148→                        item {
   149→                            FilterChip(selected = filterType == null,
   150→                                onClick = { filterType = null }, label = { Text("All") })
   151→                        }
   152→                        items(EntryType.entries) { type ->
   153→                            FilterChip(
   154→                                selected = filterType == type,
   155→                                onClick = { filterType = if (filterType == type) null else type },
   156→                                label = { Text(entryLabel(type)) },
   157→                                leadingIcon = {
   158→                                    Icon(entryIcon(type), null,
   159→                                        modifier = Modifier.size(15.dp),
   160→                                        tint = entryColor(type))
   161→                                }
   162→                            )
   163→                        }
   164→                    }
   165→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   166→                }
   167→            }
   168→
   169→            // ── Entry list ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
   170→            if (displayed.isEmpty()) {
   171→                item {
   172→                    Box(
   173→                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().padding(vertical = 40.dp),
   174→                        contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
   175→                    ) {
   176→                        Text("No entries for this day.",
   177→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   178→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
   179→                    }
   180→                }
   181→            } else {
   182→                items(displayed, key = { it.id }) { entry ->
   183→                    Box(modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 5.dp)) {
   184→                        ScheduleEntryCard(
   185→                            entry = entry,
   186→                            onEdit = { editingEntry = entry; showDialog = true },
   187→                            onDelete = { vm.delete(entry) }
   188→                        )
   189→                    }
   190→                }
   191→            }
   192→        }
   193→    }
   194→
   195→    if (showDialog) {
   196→        EntryDialog(
   197→            initial = editingEntry,
   198→            onDismiss = { showDialog = false },
   199→            onConfirm = { entry ->
   200→                if (editingEntry == null) vm.insert(entry) else vm.update(entry)
   201→                showDialog = false
   202→            }
   203→        )
   204→    }
   205→}
   206→
   207→// ── Calendar card ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   208→@Composable
   209→private fun CalendarCard(
   210→    currentMonth: YearMonth,
   211→    selectedDate: LocalDate?,
   212→    dateEntryMap: Map<LocalDate?, List<ScheduleEntry>>,
   213→    onMonthChange: (YearMonth) -> Unit,
   214→    onDateSelected: (LocalDate) -> Unit
   215→) {
   216→    val today = LocalDate.now()
   217→    val firstDay = currentMonth.atDay(1)
   218→    val daysInMonth = currentMonth.lengthOfMonth()
   219→    // Sunday = 0 offset
   220→    val startOffset = (firstDay.dayOfWeek.value % 7)
   221→    val totalCells = startOffset + daysInMonth
   222→
   223→    Card(
   224→        modifier = Modifier
   225→            .fillMaxWidth()
   226→            .padding(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 8.dp),
   227→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(16.dp),
   228→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(4.dp),
   229→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface)
   230→    ) {
   231→        Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)) {
   232→
   233→            // Month navigation
   234→            Row(
   235→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   236→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   237→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   238→            ) {
   239→                IconButton(onClick = { onMonthChange(currentMonth.minusMonths(1)) }) {
   240→                    Icon(Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack, "Previous month")
   241→                }
   242→                Text(
   243→                    text = currentMonth.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("MMMM yyyy")),
   244→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   245→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
   246→                )
   247→                IconButton(onClick = { onMonthChange(currentMonth.plusMonths(1)) }) {
   248→                    Icon(Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowForward, "Next month")
   249→                }
   250→            }
   251→
   252→            // Day-of-week headers
   253→            Row(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()) {
   254→                listOf("S","M","T","W","T","F","S").forEach { day ->
   255→                    Text(
   256→                        text = day,
   257→                        modifier = Modifier.weight(1f),
   258→                        textAlign = TextAlign.Center,
   259→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   260→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   261→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   262→                    )
   263→                }
   264→            }
   265→
   266→            Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   267→
   268→            // Day grid
   269→            val rows = (totalCells + 6) / 7
   270→            for (row in 0 until rows) {
   271→                Row(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()) {
   272→                    for (col in 0 until 7) {
   273→                        val cellIndex = row * 7 + col
   274→                        val dayNumber = cellIndex - startOffset + 1
   275→                        if (dayNumber < 1 || dayNumber > daysInMonth) {
   276→                            Box(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f).aspectRatio(1f))
   277→                        } else {
   278→                            val date = currentMonth.atDay(dayNumber)
   279→                            val entriesOnDay = dateEntryMap[date] ?: emptyList()
   280→                            val isToday = date == today
   281→                            val isSelected = date == selectedDate
   282→
   283→                            DayCell(
   284→                                day = dayNumber,
   285→                                isToday = isToday,
   286→                                isSelected = isSelected,
   287→                                entries = entriesOnDay,
   288→                                modifier = Modifier.weight(1f),
   289→                                onClick = { onDateSelected(date) }
   290→                            )
   291→                        }
   292→                    }
   293→                }
   294→            }
   295→
   296→            // Legend
   297→            Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   298→            HorizontalDivider()
   299→            Spacer(Modifier.height(6.dp))
   300→            Row(
   301→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   302→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceEvenly
   303→            ) {
   304→                EntryType.entries.forEach { type ->
   305→                    Row(
   306→                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   307→                        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(4.dp)
   308→                    ) {
   309→                        Box(modifier = Modifier
   310→                            .size(8.dp)
   311→                            .clip(CircleShape)
   312→                            .background(entryColor(type)))
   313→                        Text(entryLabel(type),
   314→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   315→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
   316→                    }
   317→                }
   318→            }
   319→        }
   320→    }
   321→}
   322→
   323→@Composable
   324→private fun DayCell(
   325→    day: Int,
   326→    isToday: Boolean,
   327→    isSelected: Boolean,
   328→    entries: List<ScheduleEntry>,
   329→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
   330→    onClick: () -> Unit
   331→) {
   332→    val dotTypes = entries.map { it.type }.distinct().take(3)
   333→
   334→    Box(
   335→        modifier = modifier
   336→            .aspectRatio(0.72f)
   337→            .clip(RoundedCornerShape(6.dp))
   338→            .then(
   339→                if (isSelected) Modifier.background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary)
   340→                else if (isToday) Modifier.border(1.5.dp, MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary, RoundedCornerShape(6.dp))
   341→                else Modifier
   342→            )
   343→            .clickable(onClick = onClick)
   344→    ) {
   345→        // Day number centered
   346→        Text(
   347→            text = day.toString(),
   348→            fontSize = 13.sp,
   349→            fontWeight = if (isToday || isSelected) FontWeight.Bold else FontWeight.Normal,
   350→            color = if (isSelected) Color.White
   351→                    else if (isToday) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   352→                    else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface,
   353→            modifier = Modifier.align(Alignment.Center)
   354→        )
   355→
   356→        // Colored indicator bars pinned to the bottom
   357→        if (dotTypes.isNotEmpty()) {
   358→            Row(
   359→                modifier = Modifier
   360→                    .align(Alignment.BottomCenter)
   361→                    .fillMaxWidth()
   362→                    .padding(horizontal = 3.dp, vertical = 3.dp),
   363→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(2.dp)
   364→            ) {
   365→                dotTypes.forEach { type ->
   366→                    Box(
   367→                        modifier = Modifier
   368→                            .weight(1f)
   369→                            .height(4.dp)
   370→                            .clip(RoundedCornerShape(2.dp))
   371→                            .background(
   372→                                if (isSelected) Color.White.copy(alpha = 0.85f)
   373→                                else entryColor(type)
   374→                            )
   375→                    )
   376→                }
   377→            }
   378→        }
   379→    }
   380→}
   381→
   382→// ── Entry card ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   383→@Composable
   384→private fun ScheduleEntryCard(
   385→    entry: ScheduleEntry,
   386→    onEdit: () -> Unit,
   387→    onDelete: () -> Unit
   388→) {
   389→    val accent    = entryColor(entry.type)
   390→    val container = entryContainerColor(entry.type)
   391→
   392→    Card(
   393→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().clickable(onClick = onEdit),
   394→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(12.dp),
   395→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = container),
   396→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(2.dp)
   397→    ) {
   398→        Row(modifier = Modifier.height(IntrinsicSize.Min)) {
   399→            Box(modifier = Modifier
   400→                .width(5.dp).fillMaxHeight()
   401→                .background(accent, RoundedCornerShape(topStart = 12.dp, bottomStart = 12.dp)))
   402→
   403→            Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f).padding(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 10.dp)) {
   404→                Row(
   405→                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   406→                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
   407→                ) {
   408→                    Surface(shape = RoundedCornerShape(6.dp), color = accent) {
   409→                        Row(
   410→                            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   411→                            modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 6.dp, vertical = 2.dp),
   412→                            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(3.dp)
   413→                        ) {
   414→                            Icon(entryIcon(entry.type), null,
   415→                                modifier = Modifier.size(11.dp), tint = Color.White)
   416→                            Text(entryLabel(entry.type),
   417→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   418→                                color = Color.White, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold)
   419→                        }
   420→                    }
   421→                    Text(entry.title,
   422→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   423→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   424→                        color = accent)
   425→                }
   426→                if (entry.description.isNotBlank()) {
   427→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(3.dp))
   428→                    Text(entry.description,
   429→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   430→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
   431→                }
   432→                Spacer(Modifier.height(6.dp))
   433→                Row(horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(12.dp)) {
   434→                    if (entry.date.isNotBlank()) {
   435→                        InfoChip(Icons.Default.DateRange, formatDisplay(entry.date), accent)
   436→                    }
   437→                    if (entry.time.isNotBlank()) {
   438→                        InfoChip(Icons.Default.Schedule, entry.time, accent)
   439→                    }
   440→                    if (entry.location.isNotBlank()) {
   441→                        InfoChip(Icons.Default.LocationOn, entry.location, accent)
   442→                    }
   443→                }
   444→            }
   445→
   446→            IconButton(
   447→                onClick = onDelete,
   448→                modifier = Modifier.align(Alignment.CenterVertically)
   449→            ) {
   450→                Icon(Icons.Default.Delete, "Delete",
   451→                    modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp),
   452→                    tint = accent.copy(alpha = 0.4f))
   453→            }
   454→        }
   455→    }
   456→}
   457→
   458→@Composable
   459→private fun InfoChip(icon: androidx.compose.ui.graphics.vector.ImageVector, text: String, color: Color) {
   460→    Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically, horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(3.dp)) {
   461→        Icon(icon, null, modifier = Modifier.size(12.dp), tint = color)
   462→        Text(text, style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall, color = color)
   463→    }
   464→}
   465→
   466→// ── Add / Edit dialog ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   467→@Composable
   468→private fun EntryDialog(
   469→    initial: ScheduleEntry?,
   470→    onDismiss: () -> Unit,
   471→    onConfirm: (ScheduleEntry) -> Unit
   472→) {
   473→    var type        by remember { mutableStateOf(initial?.type        ?: EntryType.COURSE) }
   474→    var title       by remember { mutableStateOf(initial?.title       ?: "") }
   475→    var description by remember { mutableStateOf(initial?.description ?: "") }
   476→    var date        by remember { mutableStateOf(initial?.date        ?: "") }
   477→    var time        by remember { mutableStateOf(initial?.time        ?: "") }
   478→    var location    by remember { mutableStateOf(initial?.location    ?: "") }
   479→
   480→    AlertDialog(
   481→        onDismissRequest = onDismiss,
   482→        title = { Text(if (initial == null) "Add Entry" else "Edit Entry") },
   483→        text = {
   484→            Column(verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(10.dp)) {
   485→                Text("Type", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
   486→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
   487→                Row(horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(6.dp)) {
   488→                    EntryType.entries.forEach { t ->
   489→                        FilterChip(
   490→                            selected = type == t,
   491→                            onClick = { type = t },
   492→                            label = { Text(entryLabel(t), style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall) },
   493→                            colors = FilterChipDefaults.filterChipColors(
   494→                                selectedContainerColor = entryColor(t),
   495→                                selectedLabelColor = Color.White
   496→                            )
   497→                        )
   498→                    }
   499→                }
   500→                OutlinedTextField(value = title, onValueChange = { title = it },
   501→                    label = { Text("Title *") }, singleLine = true,
   502→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth())
   503→                OutlinedTextField(value = description, onValueChange = { description = it },
   504→                    label = { Text("Description") }, maxLines = 2,
   505→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth())
   506→                Row(horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)) {
   507→                    OutlinedTextField(value = date, onValueChange = { date = it },
   508→                        label = { Text("Date") },
   509→                        placeholder = { Text("YYYY-MM-DD", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall) },
   510→                        singleLine = true, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
   511→                    OutlinedTextField(value = time, onValueChange = { time = it },
   512→                        label = { Text("Time") },
   513→                        placeholder = { Text("9:00 AM", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall) },
   514→                        singleLine = true, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
   515→                }
   516→                OutlinedTextField(value = location, onValueChange = { location = it },
   517→                    label = { Text("Location") }, singleLine = true,
   518→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth())
   519→            }
   520→        },
   521→        confirmButton = {
   522→            TextButton(
   523→                onClick = {
   524→                    onConfirm(ScheduleEntry(
   525→                        id          = initial?.id ?: java.util.UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
   526→                        type        = type,
   527→                        title       = title.trim(),
   528→                        description = description.trim(),
   529→                        date        = date.trim(),
   530→                        time        = time.trim(),
   531→                        location    = location.trim()
   532→                    ))
   533→                },
   534→                enabled = title.isNotBlank()
   535→            ) { Text(if (initial == null) "Add" else "Save") }
   536→        },
   537→        dismissButton = { TextButton(onClick = onDismiss) { Text("Cancel") } }
   538→    )
   539→}
