1→package com.example.combined_schedule.ui.screens
     2→
     3→import androidx.compose.foundation.clickable
     4→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*
     5→import androidx.compose.foundation.lazy.LazyColumn
     6→import androidx.compose.foundation.lazy.items
     7→import androidx.compose.foundation.shape.RoundedCornerShape
     8→import androidx.compose.material.icons.Icons
     9→import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.*
    10→import androidx.compose.material3.*
    11→import androidx.compose.runtime.*
    12→import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
    13→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
    14→import androidx.compose.ui.draw.alpha
    15→import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
    16→import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
    17→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.SampleEventRepository
    18→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
    19→import java.time.Duration
    20→import java.time.LocalDate
    21→import java.time.LocalTime
    22→import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
    23→
    24→data class ScheduleEvent(
    25→    val id: Int,
    26→    val title: String,
    27→    val time: LocalTime,
    28→    val location: String,
    29→    val isBus: Boolean,
    30→    val reminderEnabled: Boolean
    31→)
    32→
    33→@Composable
    34→fun HomeScreen(
    35→    onNavigateToAddEdit: () -> Unit = {},
    36→    onNavigateToNotifications: () -> Unit = {},
    37→    onCourseClick: (ScheduleEvent) -> Unit = {}
    38→) {
    39→    val today = LocalDate.now()
    40→    val dateFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("EEEE, MMMM d")
    41→    val formattedDate = today.format(dateFormatter)
    42→
    43→    // Live clock — refreshes every 30 seconds
    44→    var currentTime by remember { mutableStateOf(LocalTime.now()) }
    45→    LaunchedEffect(Unit) {
    46→        while (true) {
    47→            delay(30_000L)
    48→            currentTime = LocalTime.now()
    49→        }
    50→    }
    51→
    52→    val allEvents = SampleEventRepository.events
    53→
    54→    val pastEvents     = allEvents.filter { it.time.isBefore(currentTime) }
    55→    val upcomingEvents = allEvents.filter { !it.time.isBefore(currentTime) }
    56→    val nextEvent      = upcomingEvents.firstOrNull()
    57→
    58→    // Placeholder — wire to real settings later
    59→    val notificationsEnabled = true
    60→
    61→    Box(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()) {
    62→        LazyColumn(
    63→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
    64→            contentPadding = PaddingValues(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 16.dp),
    65→        ) {
    66→            // ── Header ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    67→            item {
    68→                HeaderSection(
    69→                    formattedDate          = formattedDate,
    70→                    remainingCount         = upcomingEvents.size,
    71→                    notificationsEnabled   = notificationsEnabled,
    72→                    onNotificationsClick   = onNavigateToNotifications
    73→                )
    74→                Spacer(Modifier.height(20.dp))
    75→            }
    76→
    77→            // ── Next Event Banner ────────────────────────────────────────────
    78→            item {
    79→                if (nextEvent != null) {
    80→                    NextEventBanner(event = nextEvent, currentTime = currentTime)
    81→                } else {
    82→                    NoMoreEventsCard()
    83→                }
    84→                Spacer(Modifier.height(20.dp))
    85→            }
    86→
    87→            // ── Today's upcoming events ──────────────────────────────────────
    88→            item {
    89→                Text(
    90→                    text = "Today's Schedule",
    91→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    92→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
    93→                )
    94→                Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
    95→            }
    96→
    97→            if (upcomingEvents.isEmpty()) {
    98→                item {
    99→                    Text(
   100→                        text = "All done for today!",
   101→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   102→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   103→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 4.dp)
   104→                    )
   105→                }
   106→            } else {
   107→                items(upcomingEvents, key = { it.id }) { event ->
   108→                    EventListItem(event = event, isPast = false, onClick = { if (!event.isBus) onCourseClick(event) })
   109→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   110→                }
   111→            }
   112→
   113→            // ── Past events (greyed out) ─────────────────────────────────────
   114→            if (pastEvents.isNotEmpty()) {
   115→                item {
   116→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   117→                    Text(
   118→                        text = "Earlier today",
   119→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
   120→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   121→                    )
   122→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   123→                }
   124→                items(pastEvents, key = { "past_${it.id}" }) { event ->
   125→                    EventListItem(event = event, isPast = true, onClick = { if (!event.isBus) onCourseClick(event) })
   126→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   127→                }
   128→            }
   129→
   130→            // Space so FAB doesn't cover the last item
   131→            item { Spacer(Modifier.height(72.dp)) }
   132→        }
   133→
   134→        FloatingActionButton(
   135→            onClick = onNavigateToAddEdit,
   136→            containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   137→            modifier = Modifier
   138→                .align(Alignment.BottomEnd)
   139→                .padding(16.dp)
   140→        ) {
   141→            Icon(Icons.Default.Add, contentDescription = "Add event")
   142→        }
   143→    }
   144→}
   145→
   146→// ─── Header ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   147→
   148→@Composable
   149→private fun HeaderSection(
   150→    formattedDate: String,
   151→    remainingCount: Int,
   152→    notificationsEnabled: Boolean,
   153→    onNotificationsClick: () -> Unit
   154→) {
   155→    Column {
   156→        Row(
   157→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   158→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   159→            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween
   160→        ) {
   161→            // App name + logo
   162→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   163→                Icon(
   164→                    imageVector = Icons.Default.DateRange,
   165→                    contentDescription = "App logo",
   166→                    tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   167→                    modifier = Modifier.size(28.dp)
   168→                )
   169→                Spacer(Modifier.width(8.dp))
   170→                Text(
   171→                    text = "CombinedSchedule",
   172→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
   173→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   174→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   175→                )
   176→            }
   177→
   178→            // Notification status indicator (tappable)
   179→            IconButton(onClick = onNotificationsClick) {
   180→                Icon(
   181→                    imageVector = if (notificationsEnabled)
   182→                        Icons.Default.Notifications
   183→                    else
   184→                        Icons.Default.NotificationsOff,
   185→                    contentDescription = if (notificationsEnabled) "Notifications on" else "Notifications off",
   186→                    tint = if (notificationsEnabled)
   187→                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   188→                    else
   189→                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   190→                )
   191→            }
   192→        }
   193→
   194→        Spacer(Modifier.height(14.dp))
   195→
   196→        Text(
   197→            text = formattedDate,
   198→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
   199→            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   200→        )
   201→
   202→        Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   203→
   204→        val statusLine = when (remainingCount) {
   205→            0    -> "No more events today"
   206→            1    -> "You have 1 event remaining today"
   207→            else -> "You have $remainingCount events remaining today"
   208→        }
   209→        Text(
   210→            text = statusLine,
   211→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   212→            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   213→        )
   214→    }
   215→}
   216→
   217→// ─── Next Event Banner ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   218→
   219→@Composable
   220→private fun NextEventBanner(event: ScheduleEvent, currentTime: LocalTime) {
   221→    val timeFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a")
   222→    val minutesUntil  = Duration.between(currentTime, event.time).toMinutes()
   223→
   224→    val countdownText = when {
   225→        minutesUntil <= 0  -> "Starting now"
   226→        minutesUntil < 60  -> "in $minutesUntil min"
   227→        else -> {
   228→            val h = minutesUntil / 60
   229→            val m = minutesUntil % 60
   230→            if (m == 0L) "in ${h}h" else "in ${h}h ${m}m"
   231→        }
   232→    }
   233→
   234→    Card(
   235→        modifier  = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   236→        shape     = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp),
   237→        colors    = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer),
   238→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = 6.dp)
   239→    ) {
   240→        Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(20.dp)) {
   241→
   242→            // "UP NEXT" label + countdown chip
   243→            Row(
   244→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   245→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   246→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   247→            ) {
   248→                Text(
   249→                    text = "UP NEXT",
   250→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   251→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   252→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.65f)
   253→                )
   254→                Surface(
   255→                    shape = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp),
   256→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   257→                ) {
   258→                    Text(
   259→                        text = countdownText,
   260→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
   261→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   262→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
   263→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 5.dp)
   264→                    )
   265→                }
   266→            }
   267→
   268→            Spacer(Modifier.height(14.dp))
   269→
   270→            // Icon + title + time
   271→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   272→                Text(
   273→                    text = if (event.isBus) "🚌" else "📚",
   274→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium
   275→                )
   276→                Spacer(Modifier.width(14.dp))
   277→                Column {
   278→                    Text(
   279→                        text = event.title,
   280→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
   281→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   282→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer
   283→                    )
   284→                    Text(
   285→                        text = event.time.format(timeFormatter),
   286→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   287→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.8f)
   288→                    )
   289→                }
   290→            }
   291→
   292→            Spacer(Modifier.height(10.dp))
   293→
   294→            // Location row
   295→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   296→                Icon(
   297→                    imageVector = Icons.Default.LocationOn,
   298→                    contentDescription = null,
   299→                    tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.65f),
   300→                    modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp)
   301→                )
   302→                Spacer(Modifier.width(4.dp))
   303→                Text(
   304→                    text = event.location,
   305→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   306→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.65f)
   307→                )
   308→            }
   309→        }
   310→    }
   311→}
   312→
   313→// ─── No More Events ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   314→
   315→@Composable
   316→private fun NoMoreEventsCard() {
   317→    Card(
   318→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   319→        shape    = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp),
   320→        colors   = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant)
   321→    ) {
   322→        Box(
   323→            modifier = Modifier
   324→                .fillMaxWidth()
   325→                .padding(28.dp),
   326→            contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
   327→        ) {
   328→            Text(
   329→                text  = "No more events today 🎉",
   330→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   331→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   332→            )
   333→        }
   334→    }
   335→}
   336→
   337→// ─── Event List Item ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   338→
   339→@Composable
   340→private fun EventListItem(event: ScheduleEvent, isPast: Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit = {}) {
   341→    val timeFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a")
   342→
   343→    Card(
   344→        modifier = Modifier
   345→            .fillMaxWidth()
   346→            .alpha(if (isPast) 0.45f else 1f)
   347→            .then(if (!event.isBus) Modifier.clickable(onClick = onClick) else Modifier),
   348→        shape     = RoundedCornerShape(12.dp),
   349→        colors    = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   350→            containerColor = if (isPast)
   351→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
   352→            else
   353→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
   354→        ),
   355→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = if (isPast) 0.dp else 2.dp)
   356→    ) {
   357→        Row(
   358→            modifier = Modifier
   359→                .fillMaxWidth()
   360→                .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 12.dp),
   361→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   362→        ) {
   363→            // Bus / class icon
   364→            Text(
   365→                text  = if (event.isBus) "🚌" else "📚",
   366→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge
   367→            )
   368→            Spacer(Modifier.width(12.dp))
   369→
   370→            // Title + time + location
   371→            Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   372→                Text(
   373→                    text       = event.title,
   374→                    style      = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   375→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   376→                )
   377→                Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   378→                    Text(
   379→                        text  = event.time.format(timeFormatter),
   380→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   381→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   382→                    )
   383→                    if (event.location.isNotEmpty()) {
   384→                        Text(
   385→                            text  = " · ${event.location}",
   386→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   387→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   388→                        )
   389→                    }
   390→                }
   391→            }
   392→
   393→            // Reminder bell
   394→            Icon(
   395→                imageVector = if (event.reminderEnabled)
   396→                    Icons.Default.Notifications
   397→                else
   398→                    Icons.Default.NotificationsOff,
   399→                contentDescription = if (event.reminderEnabled) "Reminder on" else "Reminder off",
   400→                tint = if (event.reminderEnabled)
   401→                    MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   402→                else
   403→                    MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.35f),
   404→                modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)
   405→            )
   406→        }
   407→    }
   408→}

1→package com.example.combined_schedule.ui.screens
     2→
     3→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*

toolUseResult.prompt:
Design an implementation plan for the Bus tab in an Android Jetpack Compose app (Combined Schedule) for UIUC students.

## Current State
- `BusScheduleScreen.kt` is a placeholder (just centered text "Bus Schedule")
- Bus data currently exists only as hardcoded `ScheduleEvent(isBus=true)` in `SampleEventRepository` (in-memory only)
- The HomeScreen shows bus events (with 🚌) in the daily timeline but tapping them does nothing
- No persistence or Bus-specific data model exists

## Existing Patterns to Follow
All follow the same pattern:
- **Repository**: Gson + SharedPreferences, singleton, MutableStateFlow, seed defaults on first run
  - `data/ScheduleEntryRepository.kt` - best reference
  - `data/WorkRepository.kt` - simpler reference
- **ViewModel**: delegates to repo, ViewModelProvider.Factory with Context, exposes StateFlow
  - `ui/viewmodel/ClassScheduleViewModel.kt` - reference
- **Screen**: `LocalContext.current` → `viewModel(factory = ...)`, `collectAsState()`, Scaffold + FAB + dialog
  - `ui/screens/ClassScheduleScreen.kt` - full reference for color-coded cards, filter chips, add/edit dialog pattern

## Proposed Data Model
```kotlin
data class SavedBusTrip(
    val id: String = UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
    val routeName: String,       // e.g. "22 Illini"
    val stopName: String,        // e.g. "Green & Wright"
    val direction: String = "",  // e.g. "Northbound"
    val departureTimes: List<String> = emptyList(),  // ["8:30 AM", "10:30 AM", "2:00 PM"]
    val daysOfWeek: List<String> = listOf("Mon","Tue","Wed","Thu","Fri"),
    val isFavorite: Boolean = false,
    val notes: String = ""
)
```

## Default Seeds (UIUC MTD Routes)
- 22 Illini, Green & Wright Stop, Northbound, times: 8:30 AM / 10:30 AM / 2:00 PM / 4:30 PM
- Silver (CUMTD 5), Orchard Downs, Loop, times: 7:45 AM / 12:15 PM / 5:00 PM
- Green (CUMTD 12), Main & Wright, Eastbound, times: 9:00 AM / 1:00 PM / 3:30 PM

## Desired Screen Features
1. **"Next Bus" banner** at top — shows the closest upcoming trip today with countdown (like HomeScreen's NextEventBanner)
2. **Day-of-week filter chips** — Sun Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat, defaults to today
3. **Saved route cards** — sorted by next departure time for the selected day, with:
   - Bus route color accent (orange: #E65100)
   - Route name + direction as title
   - Stop name
   - List of departure times for today (highlight the soonest upcoming one)
   - Favorite star toggle
   - Edit + Delete actions
4. **FAB** → Add new saved route (dialog with: routeName, stopName, direction, times as comma-separated, daysOfWeek multi-select, notes)
5. **Tap card** → edit dialog
6. Empty state when no routes saved

## Files to Create/Modify
- CREATE `data/SavedBusTrip.kt`
- CREATE `data/BusRepository.kt`
- CREATE `ui/viewmodel/BusScheduleViewModel.kt`
- REWRITE `ui/screens/BusScheduleScreen.kt`

## Constraints
- No external libraries beyond what's already in the project (Gson, Compose, Material3, Navigation)
- No real-time API calls — all data is user-managed
- Date format consistency: times stored as "H:MM AM/PM" strings, days as short strings
- Follow existing color/style patterns from ClassScheduleScreen

Please provide a detailed step-by-step implementation plan including exact function signatures, data flow, and UI component breakdown.

input.content:
# Bus Tab Implementation Plan

## Context
The Bus tab currently shows a placeholder ("Bus Schedule" + centered text). The user wants a fully functional bus schedule screen matching the quality of the Classes tab. The app is for UIUC students who ride MTD buses, so the screen should let them save their regular routes, see upcoming departures, and manage their schedule.

## What Will Be Built
- **"Next Bus" banner** — countdown to the closest upcoming bus today (mirrors HomeScreen's NextEventBanner)
- **Day-of-week filter chips** — defaults to today; tap to see any day's routes
- **Saved route cards** — color-coded orange, with departure times highlighted (upcoming vs. past vs. next)
- **Add/Edit dialog** — route name, stop, direction, comma-separated times, multi-select day chips
- **3 seeded UIUC MTD routes** pre-loaded on first launch
- **Favorite toggle** per route (star icon)

## Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `data/SavedBusTrip.kt` | Data model |
| `data/BusRepository.kt` | Gson + SharedPreferences persistence, singleton, seed defaults |
| `ui/viewmodel/BusScheduleViewModel.kt` | Thin ViewModel delegating to repo |

## File to Rewrite
- `ui/screens/BusScheduleScreen.kt` — full replacement of placeholder

## No Changes Needed
- `MainActivity.kt` — `Screen.Bus` already calls `BusScheduleScreen()` with no parameters

---

## Data Model (`SavedBusTrip.kt`)

```kotlin
data class SavedBusTrip(
    val id: String = UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
    val routeName: String,                          // "22 Illini"
    val stopName: String,                           // "Green & Wright"
    val direction: String = "",                     // "Northbound"
    val departureTimes: List<String> = emptyList(), // ["8:30 AM", "10:30 AM"]
    val daysOfWeek: List<String> = listOf("Mon","Tue","Wed","Thu","Fri"),
    val isFavorite: Boolean = false,
    val notes: String = ""
)
```

---

## Repository (`BusRepository.kt`)
Exact same pattern as `ScheduleEntryRepository`:
- SharedPreferences key: `"bus_trips_prefs"` / `"all_bus_trips"`
- Seed guard key: `"bus_seeded_defaults"`
- `MutableStateFlow<List<SavedBusTrip>>` + `getAll()` / `insert()` / `update()` / `delete()`
- 3 seeded defaults:
  - 22 Illini — Green & Wright — Northbound — 8:30 AM, 10:30 AM, 2:00 PM, 4:30 PM
  - Silver (CUMTD 5) — Orchard Downs — Loop — 7:45 AM, 12:15 PM, 5:00 PM
  - Green (CUMTD 12) — Main & Wright — Eastbound — 9:00 AM, 1:00 PM, 3:30 PM

---

## ViewModel (`BusScheduleViewModel.kt`)
Same thin-delegate pattern as `ClassScheduleViewModel`:
- Exposes `trips: StateFlow<List<SavedBusTrip>>`
- `insert` / `update` / `delete` delegate to repo
- `Factory(context: Context)` inner class

---

## Screen Structure (`BusScheduleScreen.kt`)

### Colors
- Accent: `Color(0xFFE65100)` (deep orange)
- Container: `Color(0xFFFFF3E0)` (orange 50)
- Favorite star: `Color(0xFFFFB300)` (amber)

### State
```kotlin
var currentTime   // live clock, LaunchedEffect 30s refresh (same as HomeScreen)
var selectedDay   // defaults to todayShortDay(), day-of-week string "Mon".."Sun"
var showDialog / editingTrip
val filteredTrips = allTrips filtered by selectedDay, sorted by earliest departureTime
val nextBusInfo: Pair<SavedBusTrip, LocalTime>? = soonest upcoming time across today's trips
```

### Layout (LazyColumn inside Scaffold+FAB)
1. `NextBusBanner` — orange card, "UP NEXT BUS" label, countdown chip, route+stop info
   - When no bus: muted "No more buses today" card
2. `DayFilterRow` — LazyRow of FilterChips (Sun–Sat), selected day uses busAccent
3. Route cards (`BusTripCard`) or empty state
4. FAB (busAccent) → opens `BusTripDialog`

### `BusTripCard`
- Same structure as `ScheduleEntryCard`: 5dp left accent bar + content column + action icons
- Shows: "BUS" badge chip, route name + direction, stop name
- `TimeChipsRow`: each departure time as a small chip
  - **Next upcoming** → busAccent background, white text
  - **Past** → greyed out (25% opacity)
  - **Future but not next** → busContainer bg, busAccent text
- Right side: star (favorite toggle) + trash (delete)

### `BusTripDialog`
- Fields: Route Name*, Stop Name*, Direction, Departure Times (comma-separated), Day-of-week multi-select chips, Notes
- Day chips use `selectedContainerColor = busAccent` when selected
- Parses times by `split(",").map { it.trim() }.filter { it.isNotBlank() }`
- Enabled when routeName and stopName are non-blank

### Key Helper
```kotlin
private fun parseTime(s: String): LocalTime? = try {
    LocalTime.parse(s.trim().uppercase(Locale.ENGLISH),
        DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a", Locale.ENGLISH))
} catch (_: Exception) { null }

private fun todayShortDay(): String =
    LocalDate.now().dayOfWeek
        .getDisplayName(TextStyle.SHORT, Locale.ENGLISH)
        .replaceFirstChar { it.uppercase() }
```

---

## Reference Files
- `data/ScheduleEntryRepository.kt` — repository pattern to replicate
- `ui/screens/ClassScheduleScreen.kt` — card structure, filter chips, dialog layout
- `ui/screens/HomeScreen.kt` — NextEventBanner countdown logic, LaunchedEffect timer

## Verification
1. Build with `./gradlew installDebug` — no errors
2. Open Bus tab → 3 seeded UIUC routes visible, today's day chip selected
3. "Next Bus" banner shows countdown to nearest departure
4. Tap different day chips → list filters correctly
5. Tap + → dialog opens; fill fields → route added and appears in list
6. Tap a card → edit dialog pre-filled; save → updates correctly
7. Trash icon → route deleted
8. Star icon → favorite toggles (amber vs grey)
9. Time chips: past times greyed, soonest upcoming highlighted orange

input.content:
# Bus Tab Implementation Plan

## Context
The Bus tab is currently a placeholder. The user wants a full-featured screen for UIUC students to manage their MTD bus routes, with real-time arrivals, a map shortcut, and push reminders — on top of a saved-routes schedule.

---

## Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `data/SavedBusTrip.kt` | Data model |
| `data/BusRepository.kt` | Gson + SharedPreferences, singleton, seed 3 UIUC routes |
| `ui/viewmodel/BusScheduleViewModel.kt` | ViewModel (trips StateFlow + insert/update/delete + real-time fetch) |
| `ui/screens/BusScheduleScreen.kt` | Full screen rewrite |
| `receiver/BusReminderReceiver.kt` | BroadcastReceiver that fires the reminder notification |

## Files to Modify
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `AndroidManifest.xml` | Add `POST_NOTIFICATIONS`, `SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM`, `RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED` permissions; register `BusReminderReceiver` |

## No Changes Needed
- `MainActivity.kt` — `Screen.Bus` already calls `BusScheduleScreen()` with no params

---

## 1. Data Model (`data/SavedBusTrip.kt`)

```kotlin
data class SavedBusTrip(
    val id: String = UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
    val routeName: String,                           // "22 Illini"
    val stopName: String,                            // "Green & Wright"
    val direction: String = "",                      // "Northbound"
    val departureTimes: List<String> = emptyList(),  // ["8:30 AM", "10:30 AM"] — user-managed
    val daysOfWeek: List<String> = listOf("Mon","Tue","Wed","Thu","Fri"),
    val isFavorite: Boolean = false,
    val reminderMinutes: Int = 0,   // 0 = no reminder; 5/10/15 = minutes before departure
    val notes: String = ""
)
```

---

## 2. Repository (`data/BusRepository.kt`)
Mirrors `ScheduleEntryRepository` exactly:
- SharedPreferences: `"bus_trips_prefs"` / key `"all_bus_trips"` / seed guard `"bus_seeded_defaults"`
- `MutableStateFlow<List<SavedBusTrip>>` with `getAll()` / `insert()` / `update()` / `delete()`
- **3 seeded defaults:**
  - 22 Illini — Green & Wright — Northbound — 8:30 AM, 10:30 AM, 2:00 PM, 4:30 PM
  - Silver (CUMTD 5) — Orchard Downs — Loop — 7:45 AM, 12:15 PM, 5:00 PM
  - Green (CUMTD 12) — Main & Wright — Eastbound — 9:00 AM, 1:00 PM, 3:30 PM

---

## 3. ViewModel (`ui/viewmodel/BusScheduleViewModel.kt`)

```kotlin
class BusScheduleViewModel(private val repo: BusRepository, private val app: Application) : AndroidViewModel(app) {
    val trips: StateFlow<List<SavedBusTrip>> = repo.getAll()

    // Real-time: nullable map of routeName → list of live arrival strings
    private val _liveArrivals = MutableStateFlow<Map<String, List<String>>>(emptyMap())
    val liveArrivals: StateFlow<Map<String, List<String>>> = _liveArrivals.asStateFlow()
    var isLoadingLive by mutableStateOf(false)
        private set

    fun fetchLiveArrivals(routeName: String) { ... }  // see §6

    fun insert(trip: SavedBusTrip) = repo.insert(trip)
    fun update(trip: SavedBusTrip) = repo.update(trip)
    fun delete(trip: SavedBusTrip) = repo.delete(trip)
    fun scheduleReminder(trip: SavedBusTrip, departureTime: LocalTime) { ... }  // see §7

    class Factory(private val context: Context) : ViewModelProvider.Factory { ... }
}
```

Uses `AndroidViewModel` (instead of plain `ViewModel`) so it can access `Application` context for `AlarmManager` and `NotificationManager` without leaking a `Context`.

---

## 4. Screen Structure (`ui/screens/BusScheduleScreen.kt`)

### Colors
- Accent: `Color(0xFFE65100)` (deep orange)
- Container: `Color(0xFFFFF3E0)` (orange 50)
- Favorite: `Color(0xFFFFB300)` (amber)

### State
```kotlin
var currentTime  // live clock — LaunchedEffect 30s refresh, same as HomeScreen
var selectedDay  // defaults to todayShortDay()
var showDialog / editingTrip

val filteredTrips  // allTrips filtered by selectedDay, sorted by earliest departureTime
val nextBusInfo: Pair<SavedBusTrip, LocalTime>?  // soonest upcoming trip today
```

### Layout (LazyColumn inside Scaffold + FAB)
1. **NextBusBanner** — orange card, "UP NEXT BUS" + countdown chip + route/stop; "No more buses today" when null
2. **DayFilterRow** — LazyRow Sun–Sat FilterChips, selected = busAccent
3. **Route cards** (`BusTripCard`) or empty state
4. **FAB** (busAccent) → `BusTripDialog`

---

## 5. `BusTripCard`
Same structure as `ScheduleEntryCard` (5dp left bar, content column, right actions):
- "BUS" badge chip + route name + direction
- Stop name as subtitle
- `TimeChipsRow`: each departure time styled as:
  - **Soonest upcoming** → busAccent bg, white text
  - **Past** → 25% opacity grey
  - **Other future** → busContainer bg, busAccent text
- **Live arrivals**: if `liveArrivals[trip.routeName]` is non-empty, show a teal "LIVE" chip + next live arrival time below TimeChipsRow; show a loading shimmer while fetching
- **Map icon** (📍) → deep-link to Google Maps: `Intent(ACTION_VIEW, Uri.parse("geo:0,0?q=${stopName}"))`
- **Bell icon** → trigger `scheduleReminder()` for the soonest upcoming departure
- **Star** → favorite toggle
- **Trash** → delete

---

## 6. Real-Time Arrivals (CUMTD API)

**Approach:** `HttpURLConnection` + Gson — no extra libraries needed (coroutines already available via `lifecycle-runtime-ktx`).

```kotlin
// In BusScheduleViewModel
fun fetchLiveArrivals(routeName: String) {
    viewModelScope.launch {
        isLoadingLive = true
        val result = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
            try {
                val encoded = URLEncoder.encode(routeName, "UTF-8")
                val url = URL("https://developer.cumtd.com/api/v2.2/json/getdeparturestimesbyroute" +
                              "?key=$CUMTD_API_KEY&route_id=$encoded")
                val conn = url.openConnection() as HttpURLConnection
                conn.connectTimeout = 5_000
                conn.readTimeout = 5_000
                val json = conn.inputStream.bufferedReader().readText()
                // Parse with Gson — extract "expected_start" fields from departures array
                parseCumtdDepartures(json)  // returns List<String> of formatted times
            } catch (_: Exception) { null }
        }
        if (result != null) _liveArrivals.value = _liveArrivals.value + (routeName to result)
        isLoadingLive = false
    }
}

companion object {
    // User must set their own CUMTD API key here
    private const val CUMTD_API_KEY = "YOUR_CUMTD_API_KEY"
}
```

> **Note:** User must register for a free CUMTD API key at https://developer.cumtd.com and paste it in as the `CUMTD_API_KEY` constant. The UI gracefully falls back to saved times if the key is unset or the request fails.

---

## 7. Push Reminders (AlarmManager)

### `receiver/BusReminderReceiver.kt`
```kotlin
class BusReminderReceiver : BroadcastReceiver() {
    override fun onReceive(context: Context, intent: Intent) {
        val routeName = intent.getStringExtra("routeName") ?: return
        val time      = intent.getStringExtra("time")      ?: return
        // Post a notification: "🚌 $routeName departs at $time"
        val nm = context.getSystemService(NotificationManager::class.java)
        nm.createNotificationChannelIfNeeded()  // idempotent channel creation
        nm.notify(routeName.hashCode(), buildNotification(context, routeName, time))
    }
}
```

### Scheduling (in ViewModel)
```kotlin
fun scheduleReminder(trip: SavedBusTrip, departureTime: LocalTime) {
    val triggerMs = System.currentTimeMillis() +
        Duration.between(LocalTime.now(), departureTime).toMillis() -
        trip.reminderMinutes * 60_000L
    if (triggerMs < System.currentTimeMillis()) return

    val intent = PendingIntent.getBroadcast(app, trip.id.hashCode(),
        Intent(app, BusReminderReceiver::class.java).apply {
            putExtra("routeName", trip.routeName)
            putExtra("time", departureTime.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a")))
        },
        PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
    )
    val am = app.getSystemService(AlarmManager::class.java)
    am.setExactAndAllowWhileIdle(AlarmManager.RTC_WAKEUP, triggerMs, intent)
}
```

### Manifest additions
```xml
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" />
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM" />

<receiver android:name=".receiver.BusReminderReceiver" android:exported="false" />
```

Runtime permission request for `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` (Android 13+) added in `BusScheduleScreen` via `rememberLauncherForActivityResult`.

---

## 8. `BusTripDialog` Fields
- Route Name* (required)
- Stop Name* (required)
- Direction
- Departure Times (comma-separated, e.g. `8:30 AM, 10:30 AM`)
- Day-of-week multi-select chips (Sun–Sat, busAccent when selected)
- Reminder (DropdownMenu: None / 5 min / 10 min / 15 min)
- Notes

---

## 9. Key Helpers
```kotlin
private fun parseTime(s: String): LocalTime? = try {
    LocalTime.parse(s.trim().uppercase(Locale.ENGLISH),
        DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a", Locale.ENGLISH))
} catch (_: Exception) { null }

private fun todayShortDay(): String =
    LocalDate.now().dayOfWeek
        .getDisplayName(TextStyle.SHORT, Locale.ENGLISH)
        .replaceFirstChar { it.uppercase() }
```

---

## Reference Files
- `data/ScheduleEntryRepository.kt` — repository pattern
- `ui/screens/ClassScheduleScreen.kt` — card structure, filter chips, dialog
- `ui/screens/HomeScreen.kt` — NextEventBanner, countdown, LaunchedEffect timer

## Verification
1. `./gradlew installDebug` — clean build
2. Bus tab shows 3 seeded routes; today's day chip selected
3. Next Bus banner shows countdown; updates every 30s
4. Day chips filter the list correctly
5. 📍 map icon opens Google Maps for the stop
6. Tap "LIVE" fetch button → live arrivals appear (or graceful fallback)
7. Add/edit/delete/favorite all work
8. Set a 5-min reminder → notification fires at correct time

# Bus Tab Implementation Plan

## Context
The Bus tab currently shows a placeholder ("Bus Schedule" + centered text). The user wants a fully functional bus schedule screen matching the quality of the Classes tab. The app is for UIUC students who ride MTD buses, so the screen should let them save their regular routes, see upcoming departures, and manage their schedule.

## What Will Be Built
- **"Next Bus" banner** — countdown to the closest upcoming bus today (mirrors HomeScreen's NextEventBanner)
- **Day-of-week filter chips** — defaults to today; tap to see any day's routes
- **Saved route cards** — color-coded orange, with departure times highlighted (upcoming vs. past vs. next)
- **Add/Edit dialog** — route name, stop, direction, comma-separated times, multi-select day chips
- **3 seeded UIUC MTD routes** pre-loaded on first launch
- **Favorite toggle** per route (star icon)

## Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `data/SavedBusTrip.kt` | Data model |
| `data/BusRepository.kt` | Gson + SharedPreferences persistence, singleton, seed defaults |
| `ui/viewmodel/BusScheduleViewModel.kt` | Thin ViewModel delegating to repo |

## File to Rewrite
- `ui/screens/BusScheduleScreen.kt` — full replacement of placeholder

## No Changes Needed
- `MainActivity.kt` — `Screen.Bus` already calls `BusScheduleScreen()` with no parameters

---

## Data Model (`SavedBusTrip.kt`)

```kotlin
data class SavedBusTrip(
    val id: String = UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
    val routeName: String,                          // "22 Illini"
    val stopName: String,                           // "Green & Wright"
    val direction: String = "",                     // "Northbound"
    val departureTimes: List<String> = emptyList(), // ["8:30 AM", "10:30 AM"]
    val daysOfWeek: List<String> = listOf("Mon","Tue","Wed","Thu","Fri"),
    val isFavorite: Boolean = false,
    val notes: String = ""
)
```

---

## Repository (`BusRepository.kt`)
Exact same pattern as `ScheduleEntryRepository`:
- SharedPreferences key: `"bus_trips_prefs"` / `"all_bus_trips"`
- Seed guard key: `"bus_seeded_defaults"`
- `MutableStateFlow<List<SavedBusTrip>>` + `getAll()` / `insert()` / `update()` / `delete()`
- 3 seeded defaults:
  - 22 Illini — Green & Wright — Northbound — 8:30 AM, 10:30 AM, 2:00 PM, 4:30 PM
  - Silver (CUMTD 5) — Orchard Downs — Loop — 7:45 AM, 12:15 PM, 5:00 PM
  - Green (CUMTD 12) — Main & Wright — Eastbound — 9:00 AM, 1:00 PM, 3:30 PM

---

## ViewModel (`BusScheduleViewModel.kt`)
Same thin-delegate pattern as `ClassScheduleViewModel`:
- Exposes `trips: StateFlow<List<SavedBusTrip>>`
- `insert` / `update` / `delete` delegate to repo
- `Factory(context: Context)` inner class

---

## Screen Structure (`BusScheduleScreen.kt`)

### Colors
- Accent: `Color(0xFFE65100)` (deep orange)
- Container: `Color(0xFFFFF3E0)` (orange 50)
- Favorite star: `Color(0xFFFFB300)` (amber)

### State
```kotlin
var currentTime   // live clock, LaunchedEffect 30s refresh (same as HomeScreen)
var selectedDay   // defaults to todayShortDay(), day-of-week string "Mon".."Sun"
var showDialog / editingTrip
val filteredTrips = allTrips filtered by selectedDay, sorted by earliest departureTime
val nextBusInfo: Pair<SavedBusTrip, LocalTime>? = soonest upcoming time across today's trips
```

### Layout (LazyColumn inside Scaffold+FAB)
1. `NextBusBanner` — orange card, "UP NEXT BUS" label, countdown chip, route+stop info
   - When no bus: muted "No more buses today" card
2. `DayFilterRow` — LazyRow of FilterChips (Sun–Sat), selected day uses busAccent
3. Route cards (`BusTripCard`) or empty state
4. FAB (busAccent) → opens `BusTripDialog`

### `BusTripCard`
- Same structure as `ScheduleEntryCard`: 5dp left accent bar + content column + action icons
- Shows: "BUS" badge chip, route name + direction, stop name
- `TimeChipsRow`: each departure time as a small chip
  - **Next upcoming** → busAccent background, white text
  - **Past** → greyed out (25% opacity)
  - **Future but not next** → busContainer bg, busAccent text
- Right side: star (favorite toggle) + trash (delete)

### `BusTripDialog`
- Fields: Route Name*, Stop Name*, Direction, Departure Times (comma-separated), Day-of-week multi-select chips, Notes
- Day chips use `selectedContainerColor = busAccent` when selected
- Parses times by `split(",").map { it.trim() }.filter { it.isNotBlank() }`
- Enabled when routeName and stopName are non-blank

### Key Helper
```kotlin
private fun parseTime(s: String): LocalTime? = try {
    LocalTime.parse(s.trim().uppercase(Locale.ENGLISH),
        DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a", Locale.ENGLISH))
} catch (_: Exception) { null }

private fun todayShortDay(): String =
    LocalDate.now().dayOfWeek
        .getDisplayName(TextStyle.SHORT, Locale.ENGLISH)
        .replaceFirstChar { it.uppercase() }
```

---

## Reference Files
- `data/ScheduleEntryRepository.kt` — repository pattern to replicate
- `ui/screens/ClassScheduleScreen.kt` — card structure, filter chips, dialog layout
- `ui/screens/HomeScreen.kt` — NextEventBanner countdown logic, LaunchedEffect timer

## Verification
1. Build with `./gradlew installDebug` — no errors
2. Open Bus tab → 3 seeded UIUC routes visible, today's day chip selected
3. "Next Bus" banner shows countdown to nearest departure
4. Tap different day chips → list filters correctly
5. Tap + → dialog opens; fill fields → route added and appears in list
6. Tap a card → edit dialog pre-filled; save → updates correctly
7. Trash icon → route deleted
8. Star icon → favorite toggles (amber vs grey)
9. Time chips: past times greyed, soonest upcoming highlighted orange

input.plan:
# Bus Tab Implementation Plan

## Context
The Bus tab is currently a placeholder. The user wants a full-featured screen for UIUC students to manage their MTD bus routes, with real-time arrivals, a map shortcut, and push reminders — on top of a saved-routes schedule.

---

## Files to Create
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `data/SavedBusTrip.kt` | Data model |
| `data/BusRepository.kt` | Gson + SharedPreferences, singleton, seed 3 UIUC routes |
| `ui/viewmodel/BusScheduleViewModel.kt` | ViewModel (trips StateFlow + insert/update/delete + real-time fetch) |
| `ui/screens/BusScheduleScreen.kt` | Full screen rewrite |
| `receiver/BusReminderReceiver.kt` | BroadcastReceiver that fires the reminder notification |

## Files to Modify
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `AndroidManifest.xml` | Add `POST_NOTIFICATIONS`, `SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM`, `RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED` permissions; register `BusReminderReceiver` |

## No Changes Needed
- `MainActivity.kt` — `Screen.Bus` already calls `BusScheduleScreen()` with no params

---

## 1. Data Model (`data/SavedBusTrip.kt`)

```kotlin
data class SavedBusTrip(
    val id: String = UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
    val routeName: String,                           // "22 Illini"
    val stopName: String,                            // "Green & Wright"
    val direction: String = "",                      // "Northbound"
    val departureTimes: List<String> = emptyList(),  // ["8:30 AM", "10:30 AM"] — user-managed
    val daysOfWeek: List<String> = listOf("Mon","Tue","Wed","Thu","Fri"),
    val isFavorite: Boolean = false,
    val reminderMinutes: Int = 0,   // 0 = no reminder; 5/10/15 = minutes before departure
    val notes: String = ""
)
```

---

## 2. Repository (`data/BusRepository.kt`)
Mirrors `ScheduleEntryRepository` exactly:
- SharedPreferences: `"bus_trips_prefs"` / key `"all_bus_trips"` / seed guard `"bus_seeded_defaults"`
- `MutableStateFlow<List<SavedBusTrip>>` with `getAll()` / `insert()` / `update()` / `delete()`
- **3 seeded defaults:**
  - 22 Illini — Green & Wright — Northbound — 8:30 AM, 10:30 AM, 2:00 PM, 4:30 PM
  - Silver (CUMTD 5) — Orchard Downs — Loop — 7:45 AM, 12:15 PM, 5:00 PM
  - Green (CUMTD 12) — Main & Wright — Eastbound — 9:00 AM, 1:00 PM, 3:30 PM

---

## 3. ViewModel (`ui/viewmodel/BusScheduleViewModel.kt`)

```kotlin
class BusScheduleViewModel(private val repo: BusRepository, private val app: Application) : AndroidViewModel(app) {
    val trips: StateFlow<List<SavedBusTrip>> = repo.getAll()

    // Real-time: nullable map of routeName → list of live arrival strings
    private val _liveArrivals = MutableStateFlow<Map<String, List<String>>>(emptyMap())
    val liveArrivals: StateFlow<Map<String, List<String>>> = _liveArrivals.asStateFlow()
    var isLoadingLive by mutableStateOf(false)
        private set

    fun fetchLiveArrivals(routeName: String) { ... }  // see §6

    fun insert(trip: SavedBusTrip) = repo.insert(trip)
    fun update(trip: SavedBusTrip) = repo.update(trip)
    fun delete(trip: SavedBusTrip) = repo.delete(trip)
    fun scheduleReminder(trip: SavedBusTrip, departureTime: LocalTime) { ... }  // see §7

    class Factory(private val context: Context) : ViewModelProvider.Factory { ... }
}
```

Uses `AndroidViewModel` (instead of plain `ViewModel`) so it can access `Application` context for `AlarmManager` and `NotificationManager` without leaking a `Context`.

---

## 4. Screen Structure (`ui/screens/BusScheduleScreen.kt`)

### Colors
- Accent: `Color(0xFFE65100)` (deep orange)
- Container: `Color(0xFFFFF3E0)` (orange 50)
- Favorite: `Color(0xFFFFB300)` (amber)

### State
```kotlin
var currentTime  // live clock — LaunchedEffect 30s refresh, same as HomeScreen
var selectedDay  // defaults to todayShortDay()
var showDialog / editingTrip

val filteredTrips  // allTrips filtered by selectedDay, sorted by earliest departureTime
val nextBusInfo: Pair<SavedBusTrip, LocalTime>?  // soonest upcoming trip today
```

### Layout (LazyColumn inside Scaffold + FAB)
1. **NextBusBanner** — orange card, "UP NEXT BUS" + countdown chip + route/stop; "No more buses today" when null
2. **DayFilterRow** — LazyRow Sun–Sat FilterChips, selected = busAccent
3. **Route cards** (`BusTripCard`) or empty state
4. **FAB** (busAccent) → `BusTripDialog`

---

## 5. `BusTripCard`
Same structure as `ScheduleEntryCard` (5dp left bar, content column, right actions):
- "BUS" badge chip + route name + direction
- Stop name as subtitle
- `TimeChipsRow`: each departure time styled as:
  - **Soonest upcoming** → busAccent bg, white text
  - **Past** → 25% opacity grey
  - **Other future** → busContainer bg, busAccent text
- **Live arrivals**: if `liveArrivals[trip.routeName]` is non-empty, show a teal "LIVE" chip + next live arrival time below TimeChipsRow; show a loading shimmer while fetching
- **Map icon** (📍) → deep-link to Google Maps: `Intent(ACTION_VIEW, Uri.parse("geo:0,0?q=${stopName}"))`
- **Bell icon** → trigger `scheduleReminder()` for the soonest upcoming departure
- **Star** → favorite toggle
- **Trash** → delete

---

## 6. Real-Time Arrivals (CUMTD API)

**Approach:** `HttpURLConnection` + Gson — no extra libraries needed (coroutines already available via `lifecycle-runtime-ktx`).

```kotlin
// In BusScheduleViewModel
fun fetchLiveArrivals(routeName: String) {
    viewModelScope.launch {
        isLoadingLive = true
        val result = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
            try {
                val encoded = URLEncoder.encode(routeName, "UTF-8")
                val url = URL("https://developer.cumtd.com/api/v2.2/json/getdeparturestimesbyroute" +
                              "?key=$CUMTD_API_KEY&route_id=$encoded")
                val conn = url.openConnection() as HttpURLConnection
                conn.connectTimeout = 5_000
                conn.readTimeout = 5_000
                val json = conn.inputStream.bufferedReader().readText()
                // Parse with Gson — extract "expected_start" fields from departures array
                parseCumtdDepartures(json)  // returns List<String> of formatted times
            } catch (_: Exception) { null }
        }
        if (result != null) _liveArrivals.value = _liveArrivals.value + (routeName to result)
        isLoadingLive = false
    }
}

companion object {
    // User must set their own CUMTD API key here
    private const val CUMTD_API_KEY = "YOUR_CUMTD_API_KEY"
}
```

> **Note:** User must register for a free CUMTD API key at https://developer.cumtd.com and paste it in as the `CUMTD_API_KEY` constant. The UI gracefully falls back to saved times if the key is unset or the request fails.

---

## 7. Push Reminders (AlarmManager)

### `receiver/BusReminderReceiver.kt`
```kotlin
class BusReminderReceiver : BroadcastReceiver() {
    override fun onReceive(context: Context, intent: Intent) {
        val routeName = intent.getStringExtra("routeName") ?: return
        val time      = intent.getStringExtra("time")      ?: return
        // Post a notification: "🚌 $routeName departs at $time"
        val nm = context.getSystemService(NotificationManager::class.java)
        nm.createNotificationChannelIfNeeded()  // idempotent channel creation
        nm.notify(routeName.hashCode(), buildNotification(context, routeName, time))
    }
}
```

### Scheduling (in ViewModel)
```kotlin
fun scheduleReminder(trip: SavedBusTrip, departureTime: LocalTime) {
    val triggerMs = System.currentTimeMillis() +
        Duration.between(LocalTime.now(), departureTime).toMillis() -
        trip.reminderMinutes * 60_000L
    if (triggerMs < System.currentTimeMillis()) return

    val intent = PendingIntent.getBroadcast(app, trip.id.hashCode(),
        Intent(app, BusReminderReceiver::class.java).apply {
            putExtra("routeName", trip.routeName)
            putExtra("time", departureTime.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a")))
        },
        PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
    )
    val am = app.getSystemService(AlarmManager::class.java)
    am.setExactAndAllowWhileIdle(AlarmManager.RTC_WAKEUP, triggerMs, intent)
}
```

### Manifest additions
```xml
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" />
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM" />

<receiver android:name=".receiver.BusReminderReceiver" android:exported="false" />
```

Runtime permission request for `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` (Android 13+) added in `BusScheduleScreen` via `rememberLauncherForActivityResult`.

---

## 8. `BusTripDialog` Fields
- Route Name* (required)
- Stop Name* (required)
- Direction
- Departure Times (comma-separated, e.g. `8:30 AM, 10:30 AM`)
- Day-of-week multi-select chips (Sun–Sat, busAccent when selected)
- Reminder (DropdownMenu: None / 5 min / 10 min / 15 min)
- Notes

---

## 9. Key Helpers
```kotlin
private fun parseTime(s: String): LocalTime? = try {
    LocalTime.parse(s.trim().uppercase(Locale.ENGLISH),
        DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a", Locale.ENGLISH))
} catch (_: Exception) { null }

private fun todayShortDay(): String =
    LocalDate.now().dayOfWeek
        .getDisplayName(TextStyle.SHORT, Locale.ENGLISH)
        .replaceFirstChar { it.uppercase() }
```

---

## Reference Files
- `data/ScheduleEntryRepository.kt` — repository pattern
- `ui/screens/ClassScheduleScreen.kt` — card structure, filter chips, dialog
- `ui/screens/HomeScreen.kt` — NextEventBanner, countdown, LaunchedEffect timer

## Verification
1. `./gradlew installDebug` — clean build
2. Bus tab shows 3 seeded routes; today's day chip selected
3. Next Bus banner shows countdown; updates every 30s
4. Day chips filter the list correctly
5. 📍 map icon opens Google Maps for the stop
6. Tap "LIVE" fetch button → live arrivals appear (or graceful fallback)
7. Add/edit/delete/favorite all work
8. Set a 5-min reminder → notification fires at correct time
